programme.desc: The toddler and Pengy Quin embark on a snowy adventure, and have fun doing cartwheels

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies bounce on The Tubby Bouncy. Po bounces as high as a cloud, then Laa-Laa bounces higher, Dipsy bounces even higher and Tinky Winky bounces highest of all

programme.title: Timmy Time
programme.desc: Yabba is given a drum to play, but Timmy is determined to exchange it for his triangle

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: The bunny makes his own magic stone when Sula won't involve him in her game - but disaster strikes

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: Bing and Pando pretend to be diggers while they play together in the sandpit

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: The squirrels are helping Duggee in the garden when Tag makes friends with a caterpillar. She is very hungry, so Tag feeds her the vegetable leaves they have been picking

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn how to make sandcastles on the beach, and their work turns out to be so impressive that two crabs ask the gang to build them a new home

programme.title: Go Jetters
programme.desc: When Grandmaster Glitch takes the Quadriga from the Brandenburg Gate, the Go Jetters must stop him before he reaches Grim HQ

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: Peter and his friends try to find the perfect place to eat the radishes they took from Mr McGregor's garden, but fail to realise a thief is hankering after the vegetables

programme.title: Bitz & Bob
programme.desc: Bitz and Bob's junk stall sells out of everything, including Bob's robo-helmet! Bob is horrified

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.desc: A giant saltwater crocodile wanders into freezing waters so the Octonauts try to return the predator to its warm water home

programme.title: Love Monster
programme.desc: Love Monster visits Dr Piggles on Ha Ha Ha Day, only to find that his friend has the hiccups and is unable to make his patients laugh. Dr Piggles asks Love Monster if he can fill in for him while he rests, assuring him that he'll be right there to help out. But when the hiccups get worse, he has to lock himself in the back room, and Love Monster must find ways to make all the patients laugh by himself.

programme.title: Alphablocks
programme.desc: A simple skipping game turns into a night at the circus as the letters I, G and H find themselves high up on a tightrope

programme.title: Justin's House
programme.desc: Justin needs to fix Robert the Robot's memory chips when they accidentally come loose

programme.title: Tee and Mo
programme.desc: The animated adventures of an energetic baby monkey and his long-suffering mother, who take a light-hearted approach to problem-solving and teamwork as they tackle life's challenges together

programme.title: Small Potatoes
programme.desc: The vegetables conga-dance their way through a world filled with fruit

programme.title: Timmy Time
programme.desc: Mittens and Timmy try to outdo each other while playing trains with their classmates, but soon realise they have alienated their friends

programme.title: Dog Loves Books
programme.desc: Pug wants to write exciting stories and our two friends meet Enid Brighton. She has a very vivid imagination and they go on an adventure to solve all of her mysteries. Luckily, it is all in her imagination and they return safely to the bookshop.

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: Sula and Amma go to Bing's house for lunch, and Flop needs to go to the shop for supplies. However, Bing soon begins to miss Flop

programme.title: Twirlywoos
programme.desc: A treasure hunt at a children's birthday party turns into a game of hide-and-seek as the Twirlywoos try to avoid being found. Back in the Boat the Twirlywoos are hidden by strange weeds which grow out of seeds on the floor

programme.title: Something Special
programme.desc: Using a sign language called Makaton, Something Special helps its audience learn how to communicate as well as develop their language in a fun and exciting way. Justin meets some musical friends and they put on a concert. Meanwhile, Mr Tumble is the judge of Tumbleton's Got Talent! starring Grandad Tumble, Lord Tumble and Aunt Polly

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies go on a very special picnic together. Lots of Tubby Toast pops out of the Dup Dup and lands on the picnic plates for the Teletubbies to munch

programme.title: The Baby Club
programme.desc: Babies and their grown-ups play with oranges and enjoy songs and story time together

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: After deciding to play football, Duggee starts the game by kicking the ball to the squirrels - who look at it blankly as they do not know what to do

programme.title: Andy's Dinosaur Toybox
programme.desc: Baby brachiosaurus gets split up from the herd but gets some help finding them again.

programme.title: Let's Play
programme.desc: Rebecca goes back in time to the days of cavemen and cavewomen, where she tries riding a mammoth

programme.title: Pablo
programme.desc: Pablo is fascinated by the wrinkly hands of his elderly neighbour.

programme.title: Tik Tak
programme.desc: Explore a magic coat rack and dancing toilets, and watch as Book Girl makes a music organ

programme.title: Our Family
programme.desc: The family packs up a picnic and visits a play area that's also home to some spotty pigs. Four-year-old Alexa enjoys her tasty picnic, while the pigs seemingly eat mud. Back at home the family members have a garden adventure and pretend to be superheroes - but will Super-Alexa save the day?

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: African folk tale about how the camel got its hump

programme.title: My World Kitchen
programme.desc: Ryan's mum is Vietnamese and he is cooking a dish from Vietnam that she has taught him

programme.title: Waffle the Wonder Dog
programme.desc: Doug's mum, Zoe, brings surprises for the Brooklyn-Bells, but Waffle is sad because Doug is going to stay with her for a few days. Mrs Hobbs watches Waffle with new spy equipment

programme.title: Timmy Time
programme.desc: The youngster is crestfallen when he loses his home-made puppet on the way to nursery

programme.title: Katie Morag
programme.desc: Granma Mainland is excited when Katie joins a dancing class, but it seems that ballet is not the youngster's favourite mode of dancing

programme.title: Sarah & Duck
programme.desc: Sarah wants to adopt a sea creature, but does not get her first choice

programme.title: Tee and Mo
programme.desc: Tee is super-excited when new flat-pack shelving arrives for his room. However, he soon discovers it's going take some time for Mo to build it. Pre-school animation about a baby monkey and his mother.

programme.title: Alphablocks
programme.desc: Fun with 'in', plus the five vowels, and the words van, bus, hop, red, fog, mud, tap, bug, mop, hen, din, fin and win

programme.title: Yakka Dee!
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'bus' and embarks on a whirlwind word adventure

programme.title: Numberblocks
programme.desc: Five is so good at hide-and-seek, she can find the others without looking up from her book. Plus, learning to count to five

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: The bunny's new Hoppity Voosh lunchbox is the same as Pando's. At first it is fun to match, but things turn sour when the pair mix up their lunches

programme.title: Messy Goes to OKIDO
programme.desc: Science-educational series following a curious, adventure-seeking and unruly monster as he finds the answers to everything a pre-school child would want to know

programme.title: Something Special
programme.desc: Educational programme for children aged between four and seven

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: When the Tubby Phone rings, Dipsy comes down on the Dup Dup to answer it, and the Teletubbies do the the Dipsy Tubby Phone Dance

programme.title: Olobob Top
programme.desc: Crunch is in a big grump because her new boots are dirty

programme.title: Pablo
programme.desc: Pablo wants to play with Lorna and her friend, but it's making Noa feel wobbly.

programme.title: What's the Big Idea?
programme.desc: Hugo learns about different types of work and decides to visit a busy construction site

programme.title: Time for School
programme.desc: It is Remembrance Day at the school and the children make poppies to remember those who died in the wars

programme.title: Swashbuckle
programme.desc: Captain Captain and Cook discover Line cannot swim, and try to help teach him. Meanwhile, three youngsters tackle Shivering Timbers and new game Swashing to win back Gem's jewels

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: The dog and the squirrels arrange a puppet show to tell the story of a great adventure they had

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: Peter learns not to judge a book by its cover when he takes an elderly tortoise for a quiet walk in the woods. Animated tale inspired by Beatrix Potter

programme.title: Love Monster
programme.desc: Love Monster visits Dr Piggles on Ha Ha Ha Day, only to find that his friend has the hiccups and is unable to make his patients laugh. Dr Piggles asks Love Monster if he can fill in for him while he rests, assuring him that he'll be right there to help out. But when the hiccups get worse, he has to lock himself in the back room, and Love Monster must find ways to make all the patients laugh by himself.

programme.title: Maddie's Do You Know?
programme.desc: Maddie is out and about exploring different ways to travel. She uses a special camera to find out how a bus ramp works to help people get on and off the bus. An animation shows how the ramp is hidden in a compartment underneath the doors and how air bags allow the bus to lower on one side. Next, Maddie joins a road-building team to see how a motorway is made of different layers and uses a special thermal imaging camera to see how the hot asphalt is laid

programme.title: Bitz & Bob
programme.desc: After getting stranded on Faraway Island, Bitz needs to work out how they can be rescued

programme.title: Go Jetters
programme.desc: Ubercorn and Glitch have to team up when they get stuck at the most remote place on Earth.

programme.title: Waffle the Wonder Dog
programme.desc: Mrs Hobbs interviews for a cat sitter for George, and Waffle wants the job.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran go strawberry picking and make jam to preserve the berries for longer.

programme.title: Sarah & Duck
programme.desc: Duck is bored of his toy collection, so he and Sarah search for old toys in the attic

programme.title: Moon and Me
programme.desc: Colly Wobble likes to do things differently, including driving her car backwards

programme.title: Clangers
programme.desc: In space, Tiny and Small catch the memory box Mother made when she was a little girl. Animated fun, narrated by Michael Palin

programme.title: In the Night Garden
programme.desc: Upsy Daisy sings into a megaphone and the Pontipines complain about the noise she makes. Narrated by Derek Jacobi

programme.title: CBeebies Bedtime Stories
programme.desc: A tale is read for younger viewers before they go to bed

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Dan Walker and Louise Minchin present a round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather

programme.title: Critical Incident
programme.desc: The return of the documentary using bodycam and CCTV footage to tell the stories of emergency service workers assaulted in the line of duty. Police officers are doused in petrol and threatened with being set alight when a moped chase ends in chaos

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts, Martel Maxwell and Dion Dublin follow the development progress of properties in Brompton in Kent, Workington in Cumbria and Great Barr in the West Midlands

programme.title: Ill Gotten Gains
programme.desc: The England Illegal Money Lending Team target a suspect loan shark and raid his home, and a convicted loan shark has a caravan seized in Wales

programme.title: Fraud Squad NHS
programme.desc: Investigators uncover a senior manager gambling with an NHS credit card, and tackle the cowards targeting vulnerable elderly women for their life savings

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Richard Madley and Stephanie Connell help two teams search for items in Brackley, Northamptonshire, while presenter Eric Knowles discovers a marvel of Victorian timekeeping

programme.title: BBC Wales Today; Weather
programme.desc: News and weather from BBC Wales

programme.title: The Indian Doctor
programme.desc: High-flying Delhi graduate Dr Prem Sharma and his wife Kamini move to the UK after being wooed by dreams of riches and glamour, only to find themselves residing in a small Welsh mining village. While Prem strikes up new friendships and settles into life in the Valleys, Kamini wants them to leave as soon as possible. Comedy drama set in the 1960s, starring Sanjeev Bhaskar and Ayesha Dharker

programme.title: Hairy Bikers' Best of British
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers celebrate quality produce that needs to be cooked with the respect it deserves, as they continue their culinary journey through time. The duo argue that, while convenience food serves a purpose, only the best ingredients and perfect cooking can produce something truly delicious

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Jules Hudson helps a couple of keen horticulturalists who have £450,000 to find a home in the Yorkshire Dales, and also visits RHS Garden Harlow Carr to meet Alan Titchmarsh

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Charlie Dimmock and the Rich brothers have a £5,500 budget to create a dramatic Balinese garden full of greenery and tropical plants for newlyweds Peter and Samantha in Cheltenham

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Jay Blades oversees proceedings as the show's experts restore an 80-year-old banjo, a pair of 1930s rollerskates and a 19th-century wooden salad bowl

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz in which contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions. Presented by Alexander Armstrong, with Richard Osman

programme.title: The One Show
programme.desc: The first visit of the week to the One Show studio, featuring the usual mix of topical stories and celebrity chat. Presented by Alex Jones and Chris Ramsey

programme.title: Panorama
programme.desc: The programme hears from whistleblowers working inside the Government's new coronavirus tracking system. They are so concerned about NHS Test and Trace that they are speaking out to reveal chaos, technical problems, confusion, wasted resources and a system that does not appear to them to be working. There are also interviews with members of local public health teams, who say they have largely been ignored by the Government in favour of the private companies hired to run the new centralised tracking system

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Ian hosts a business meeting at home, determined to impress a council colleague with his hospitality skills - only for Max to storm in making accusations and threats. Isaac is reeling after his meeting with the school about the drugs, leading to an altercation with Phil, and Mick is disturbed to find Frankie taking photos of Ollie. Kheerat tries to explain himself to Karen, and Rainie and Stuart say their farewells on the night before their wedding

programme.title: A Special School
programme.desc: Nurse Leanne responds to a medical emergency when a pupil has a seizure and is having difficulty breathing, while hairdresser Claire volunteers her time in the school's salon to work with pupils who find it extremely difficult and sometimes painful to have their hair

programme.title: Freddie Flintoff: Living with Bulimia
programme.desc: The former England cricketer faces up to his eating disorder of 20 years as he challenges the stigma around the condition in men. He explores how bulimia has played a part in the course of his life, discusses his own experience in detail and meets specialists and young men with eating disorders across the UK

programme.title: Stand Up for Live Comedy
programme.desc: Showcase for emerging talent, filmed in six different cities across the UK in outdoor locations with socially distanced audiences. The first edition is from Bristol, where local comedian Jayde Adams plays host to Mo Omar, Lauren Pattison and Tom Lucy

programme.title: Yung Filly's Celeb Lock-In
programme.desc: The host is joined by Wayne and Frankie Bridge on the game show, with the couple helping four Geordie households competing to win the grand prize

programme.title: Have I Got a Bit More News for You
programme.desc: Actor, writer and TV presenter Richard Ayoade takes over the reins for an extended 2019 edition of the satirical quiz, with Pointless co-host Richard Osman and comedian Kiri Pritchard-McLean joining team captains Ian Hislop and Paul Merton to poke fun at the stories making the headlines

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Dan Walker and Louise Minchin present a round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather

programme.title: Critical Incident
programme.desc: A shocking discovery by two unarmed police officers brings a bomb disposal unit to a suburb of Merseyside. In Dorset, a patient lashes out at a paramedic on the way to hospital

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts and the team explore properties about to be auctioned in Doncaster, Kent's Herne Bay, and London's Edmonton

programme.title: Ill Gotten Gains
programme.desc: How two brothers in Wales ran their own drug organisation until getting found by police. Cameras view their two much-prized Motorcross bikes being sold at auction

programme.title: Fraud Squad NHS
programme.desc: Michelle Ackerley reports on a nurse ripping off the NHS for £1000s, and the boss of a recycling firm who helped himself to millions in government money

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw and Caroline Hawley help two teams look for items at Newark Antiques Fair in Nottinghamshire, before seeing if they make profits at auction. Anita Manning presents

programme.title: BBC Wales Today; Weather
programme.desc: News and weather from BBC Wales

programme.title: The Indian Doctor
programme.desc: Colliery manager Richard Sharpe is desperate to get hold of a mysterious diary left behind by Prem's predecessor Dr Elwyn, and hires local street urchin Dan Griffiths to steal the book from the surgery. However, he underestimates Kamini's attentiveness, and the lad is caught in the act, leading to a heated confrontation. Meanwhile, the doctor has an emergency of his own to deal with when he is asked to make an unusual house call. Comedy drama, starring Mark Williams, Ayesha Dharker and Sanjeev Bhaskar

programme.title: Hairy Bikers' Best of British
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers explore the nation's love affair with beer and cider, revealing how at one time it was safer to drink ale than water. The duo are also given a chance to gain hands-on brewing experience at a cider festival

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Ginny Buckley helps a couple find a new home in the Norfolk countryside, and learns about the county's history with Lotus cars as their latest model is unveiled

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Charlie Dimmock and the Rich brothers create a practical but fun garden for a St Albans family, with play structures for the children and a place to grow fruit and vegetables

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Jay Blades and the team takes on the challenge of restoring an 18th-century French clock by a renowned maker, a 1960s radiogram, and a Victorian botanical microscope

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz in which contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions. Presented by Alexander Armstrong, with Richard Osman

programme.title: The One Show
programme.desc: Alex Jones and Chris Ramsey present another mix of nationwide reports and live studio-based chat

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: The highs and lows of life with the residents of Albert Square, Walford

programme.title: The Sheriffs Are Coming
programme.desc: Part one of two. Enforcement agents Ben Dirom and Myles Whitworth visit a car dealership to get a refund for a customer who bought an unroadworthy car, but are subjected to a barrage of abuse. In Peckham, sheriffs Luke Peacock and Grant Bailey shut down a cosmetics retailer where the owner has failed to pay his debts

programme.title: Life
programme.desc: Drama following the interconnecting stories of the tenants of a house in Manchester divided into four flats. Gail bumps into an old friend who makes a startling observation about her marriage. Belle's ordered life is thrown into disarray when he has to look after her niece. David returns from holiday with an unexpected guest. Pregnant Hannah reconnects with the father of her child. Starring Alison Steadman, Peter Davison and Adrian Lester

programme.title: Just One Night
programme.desc: Saf and Robbie hope that dating someone new will help to put the past behind them

programme.title: Just One Night
programme.desc: Sim and Aston test whether their long distance relationship is strong enough to progress

programme.title: Michael McIntyre: Happy & Glorious
programme.desc: A chance to see a show from the popular stand-up star's 2015 tour of the UK and Ireland, recorded as-live at the O2 in London. Returning to a venue he has visited 27 times in the past, more than any other artist in the world, Michael showcases his particular brand of wit, taking aim once again at some of the absurdities of everyday life

programme.title: Ambulance
programme.desc: Staff of London Ambulance Service gear themselves up for the fall out from another day of intense politics in the city, as hundreds of thousands of protesters take to the streets. Despite all their planning in how to handle the crowds, the team in control are taken by surprise by a problem no one had foreseen - the entire computer system used to respond to 999 calls crashes. Elsewhere, staff receive a call about a patient who is not breathing, and Advanced Paramedic Kev is immediately dispatched to the cardiac arrest

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Dan Walker and Louise Minchin present a round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather

programme.title: Critical Incident
programme.desc: Firefighters are shocked when they are attacked by the residents of a house on fire as they try to put it out, while West Midlands Police officers patrol Birmingham on Black Friday

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: The presenters explore a bungalow near the coast in Dymchurch in Kent, a detached house in Glanamman in Carmarthenshire and a terraced house in Thornton Heath in Surrey

programme.title: Ill Gotten Gains
programme.desc: Police in Derby hit the streets to arrest dealers making money on their patch, and money raised from selling criminals goods is used to help feed people at a pop-up restaurant

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Nick Hall and Caroline Hawley guide two teams scouring Spitalfields Market in the heart of London's East End for bargains to take to Catherine Southon's auction house. Plus, presenter Natasha Raskin Sharp finds out how the area around Spitalfields became known as Weaver's Town with TV historian Dan Cruickshank

programme.title: BBC Wales Today Coronavirus Daily Update
programme.desc: The latest developments, including the daily Welsh Government news conference

programme.title: BBC Wales Today; Weather
programme.desc: News and weather from BBC Wales

programme.title: The Indian Doctor
programme.desc: Kamini wants to escape from Trefelin but realises she is the only one who can help local tearaway Dan when he gets into trouble. Prem learns more about the miners' deteriorating health as Megan helps him translate the previous doctor's diary. Comedy drama set in the 1960s, starring Sanjeev Bhaskar and Ayesha Dharker

programme.title: Hairy Bikers' Best of British
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers continue their culinary journey by exploring the history behind some of Britain's famous pies, a dish the duo have written a book about. They also find out 'who ate all the pies' on the football pitch

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Margherita Taylor helps a retired couple escape to the tranquillity of Norfolk after 30 years in a busy Essex town. Now that their children have flown the nest, the pair are hoping to find a country home that's full of character for their £350,000 budget. Elsewhere, Margherita discovers Norfolk's answer to the Great Barrier Reef

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Charlie Dimmock and Harry and David Rich transform a garden in Bournemouth for young married couple Thomas and Rhiann, who long for a family-friendly garden with a koi carp pond

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Jay Blades and the team restore three more treasured family heirlooms, working on a Victorian railway lamp, a musical jewellery box and a Brownie toadstool

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz in which contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions. Presented by Alexander Armstrong, with Richard Osman

programme.title: The One Show
programme.desc: Magazine show, with stories of interest from around the UK, plus celebrity guests in the studio. Presented by Alex Jones and Chris Ramsey

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: After a heavy night partying, Alison and Mike wake to find their house in disarray and with the clock ticking until a potentially crucial business partner comes to view the venue, the couple attempt a mass clean up. The ghosts are all acting very strangely, and Alison struggles to piece together the events of the night before to figure out what happened to them

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Stephen Kember is given a long-mute music box that once belonged to a professional stage magician and toy experts Julia Tatchell and Amanda Middleditch get their hands on a much-loved push-along horse that has seen better days. Other items up for repair are a water-damaged penny arcade game and an old leather-backed chair

programme.title: Ambulance
programme.desc: Filmed in the autumn of 2019, cameras follow a new cast of characters from the London Ambulance Service as they care for the nine million people of the city. In the third episode, crew members in the capital respond to reports of an armed male and two stabbings. Elsewhere, Adam and Orani are dispatched to a long-term heroin user whose concerned mum has called for help

programme.title: Love Life
programme.desc: Romantic comedy anthology series. After struggling to make romantic connections in her younger years, Darby finally falls in love. Starring Anna Kendrick

programme.title: Love Life
programme.desc: A year later, Darby's life and career feel stagnant. When sparks fly with Bradley, her former boss who is recently divorced and highly successful, Darby feels pressure to revisit her half-baked dream of becoming a photographer - but soon gets swept up into girlfriend duties instead. Romantic comedy anthology series, starring Anna Kendrick

programme.title: The Grand Party Hotel
programme.desc: Behind the doors of the Shankly Hotel in Liverpool, which has themed party suites so guests can celebrate important moments in their lives. But with the hotel's online rating having slipped, a new general manager has been called in to shake things up, although his changes do not go down well with the staff. Elsewhere, wedding planner Ciara helps brides-to-be Trudie and Danielle, while guest relations officer Liam looks after Laura, who has checked in to celebrate her recent divorce

The ghosts are all acting very strangely, and Alison struggles to piece together the events of the night before to figure out what happened to them

programme.title: Freddie Flintoff: Living with Bulimia
programme.desc: The former England cricketer faces up to his eating disorder of 20 years as he challenges the stigma around the condition in men. He explores how bulimia has played a part in the course of his life, discusses his own experience in detail and meets specialists and young men with eating disorders across the UK

programme.title: Love Life
programme.desc: Romantic comedy anthology series. After struggling to make romantic connections in her younger years, Darby finally falls in love. Starring Anna Kendrick

programme.title: Love Life
programme.desc: A year later, Darby's life and career feel stagnant. When sparks fly with Bradley, her former boss who is recently divorced and highly successful, Darby feels pressure to revisit her half-baked dream of becoming a photographer - but soon gets swept up into girlfriend duties instead. Romantic comedy anthology series, starring Anna Kendrick

programme.title: The Grand Party Hotel
programme.desc: Behind the doors of the Shankly Hotel in Liverpool, which has themed party suites so guests can celebrate important moments in their lives. But with the hotel's online rating having slipped, a new general manager has been called in to shake things up, although his changes do not go down well with the staff. Elsewhere, wedding planner Ciara helps brides-to-be Trudie and Danielle, while guest relations officer Liam looks after Laura, who has checked in to celebrate her recent divorce

programme.title: Debate Night
programme.desc: Topical debate on the big issues affecting Scotland and beyond. Members of the public have an hour to put their questions to a panel of politicians and other public figures about the biggest stories and the things they care about the most

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Dan Walker and Louise Minchin present a round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather

programme.title: Critical Incident
programme.desc: The return of the documentary using bodycam and CCTV footage to tell the stories of emergency service workers assaulted in the line of duty. Police officers are doused in petrol and threatened with being set alight when a moped chase ends in chaos

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts, Martel Maxwell and Dion Dublin follow the development progress of properties in Brompton in Kent, Workington in Cumbria and Great Barr in the West Midlands

programme.title: Ill Gotten Gains
programme.desc: The England Illegal Money Lending Team target a suspect loan shark and raid his home, and a convicted loan shark has a caravan seized in Wales

programme.title: Fraud Squad NHS
programme.desc: Investigators uncover a senior manager gambling with an NHS credit card, and tackle the cowards targeting vulnerable elderly women for their life savings

programme.title: Bargain Hunt

programme.title: BBC Newsline; Weather
programme.desc: Local news worth watching from across Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Indian Doctor
programme.desc: High-flying Delhi graduate Dr Prem Sharma and his wife Kamini move to the UK after being wooed by dreams of riches and glamour, only to find themselves residing in a small Welsh mining village. While Prem strikes up new friendships and settles into life in the Valleys, Kamini wants them to leave as soon as possible. Comedy drama set in the 1960s, starring Sanjeev Bhaskar and Ayesha Dharker

programme.title: Hairy Bikers' Best of British
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers celebrate quality produce that needs to be cooked with the respect it deserves, as they continue their culinary journey through time. The duo argue that, while convenience food serves a purpose, only the best ingredients and perfect cooking can produce something truly delicious

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Jules Hudson helps a couple of keen horticulturalists who have £450,000 to find a home in the Yorkshire Dales, and also visits RHS Garden Harlow Carr to meet Alan Titchmarsh

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Charlie Dimmock and the Rich brothers have a £5,500 budget to create a dramatic Balinese garden full of greenery and tropical plants for newlyweds Peter and Samantha in Cheltenham

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Jay Blades oversees proceedings as the show's experts restore an 80-year-old banjo, a pair of 1930s rollerskates and a 19th-century wooden salad bowl

programme.title: Home Ground
programme.desc: Gavin Andrews and Jo Scott present the magazine show celebrating the richness of rural life in Northern Ireland, featuring stories about people who use the countryside for work, rest and play

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Ian hosts a business meeting at home, determined to impress a council colleague with his hospitality skills - only for Max to storm in making accusations and threats. Isaac is reeling after his meeting with the school about the drugs, leading to an altercation with Phil, and Mick is disturbed to find Frankie taking photos of Ollie. Kheerat tries to explain himself to Karen, and Rainie and Stuart say their farewells on the night before their wedding

programme.title: Panorama
programme.desc: The programme hears from whistleblowers working inside the Government's new coronavirus tracking system. They are so concerned about NHS Test and Trace that they are speaking out to reveal chaos, technical problems, confusion, wasted resources and a system that does not appear to them to be working. There are also interviews with members of local public health teams, who say they have largely been ignored by the Government in favour of the private companies hired to run the new centralised tracking system

programme.title: Freddie Flintoff: Living with Bulimia
programme.desc: The former England cricketer faces up to his eating disorder of 20 years as he challenges the stigma around the condition in men. He explores how bulimia has played a part in the course of his life, discusses his own experience in detail and meets specialists and young men with eating disorders across the UK

programme.title: True North
programme.desc: The story behind one of Belfast's most ambitious house renovations, following Pete and Ciara Boyle as they attempt to restore Ormiston House, built in 1867 for a local mill owner

programme.title: This Sporting Life
programme.desc: Dennis recalls his youth in Coalisland and rise on the professional snooker circuit. While Dennis often reached tournament finals, he always seemed to falter - leading the press to class him as an eternal runner-up. In 1985, however, everything changed with Dennis going on to make the ultimate sporting comeback in a World Championship final watched by a record-breaking 18.5 million people people. He talks to Stephen Watson about his upbringing, the World Championship title win - and the origin of those famous upside-down glasses

programme.title: Community Life

programme.title: Call air Cladach Ile (The Loss on Islay's Shore)
programme.desc: The story of two sea tragedies that brought the First World War to the Hebrides. In February 1918, the troopship Tuscania was torpedoed by a German U-boat. More than 200 American soldiers and British crew died as lifeboats were dashed against Islay's cliffs. Eight months later, HMS Otranto collided with another ship in its convoy in a fierce storm, killing nearly 500 men. Just 19 reached Islay's shore alive

programme.title: Trusadh (Compelling Stories)

programme.title: Bus Ghlaschú (Glasgow Bus)
programme.desc: The story of the Glasgow bus, a lifeline between Donegal and the Scottish city to which successive generations from that county have flocked for over two centuries. The first of four programmes offers a unique insight into the bus passengers, from the Donegal emigrants of the 1960s to the present holiday-makers, and meets its owners and drivers

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: Honour
programme.desc: When Banaz Mahmod's boyfriend reports her missing, DCI Caroline Goode discovers the missing 20-year-old had been to the police five times to report threats to life, even presenting a list of people wanting to kill her for shaming her family. Fact-based drama, starring Keeley Hawes

programme.title: ITV News at Ten
programme.desc: A fresh perspective on the major stories of the day, featuring national and international news, with reports and analysis from ITV's correspondents

programme.title: London Zoo: An Extraordinary Year
programme.desc: In March, ZSL London Zoo and its sister zoo Whipsnade fell silent as potential visitors stayed away. This two-part documentary reveals how a dedicated skeleton staff continued to care for the 20,000 animals in Regent's Park and the Dunstable Downs in Bedfordshire. Gemma and Meg must find a way to ensure that the pregnancy care for an endangered okapi isn't thrown off track by the lack of staff. Jamie continues the arachnid breeding programme, introducing a couple of huntsman spiders to each other - but it's a fraught business that could end in love-making or cannibalism

programme.title: Parveen's Indian Kitchen
programme.desc: Parveen Ashraf prepares spiced scrambled eggs and chai, a quick saag aloo, and homemade naans. programme.title: Honour
programme.desc: Part two of two. Banaz's body is found in Birmingham following a lead from a phone tap, but the DNA evidence is destroyed when a water pipe bursts. Meanwhile, Caroline tries to arrange for the last two perpetrators to be extradited from Iraq to the UK

programme.title: Exposure
programme.desc: The story of Banaz Mahmod, an Iraqi Kurd from Mitcham, south London, who was murdered by her own family in 2006 because they disapproved of her boyfriend. programme.title: London Zoo: An Extraordinary Year
programme.desc: In March, ZSL London Zoo and its sister zoo Whipsnade fell silent as potential visitors stayed away. This two-part documentary reveals how a dedicated skeleton staff continued to care for the 20,000 animals in Regent's Park and the Dunstable Downs in Bedfordshire. Gemma and Meg must find a way to ensure that the pregnancy care for an endangered okapi isn't thrown off track by the lack of staff. Jamie continues the arachnid breeding programme, introducing a couple of huntsman spiders to each other - but it's a fraught business that could end in love-making or cannibalism

programme.desc: Jack is taken hostage while interviewing a suspect, but somehow manages to talk his way out of trouble - quite an achievement for a man whose lack of tact is legendary. With David Jason, Bruce Alexander, Sam Kelly, Nicholas Jones and Saira Todd

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Bellamy tries to impress Miller by going it alone, while the arrival of tax inspector Derek Ford gets the residents of Aidensfield panicked. Vernon bears the brunt of Ford's wrath when his dodgy dealings and poor record-keeping are exposed, convincing the wheeler dealer the only way to avoid trouble is to fake his own suicide. Rural drama, guest starring James Weaver, with Mark Jordon, Geoffrey Hughes and John Duttine

programme.desc: Robert feels sad as Andy is leaving. Chris is still fuming with Kim for making him look a fool. Zoe meets Sophie's mother

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Bill and Jim have trouble when their van breaks down. Deirdre is thrilled when Tracy visits, but she has a shock in store for her mum. Jim stops the cheque he gives to Liz

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Troy is playing in an annual cricket match between Midsomer Worthy and Fletchers Cross when tragedy strikes. The wife of one of the team captains, a wealthy local landowner, is found battered to death with a cricket bat in a quarry. As Barnaby and Troy investigate, they discover no end of people with a grudge against the victim's husband - who may have been complicit in some other suspicious deaths. Guest starring Imelda Staunton and Robert Hardy

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: A local gigolo is murdered, forcing Jack to face the uncomfortable fact that some women are willing to pay for sex - and triggering an investigation that takes him into the seedy world of male escorts and their clientele. David Jason stars as the old-fashioned copper, with Isla Blair, Russell Hunter, Joanna David and Martin Jarvis

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: When the sleuth's dentist is found dead just minutes after he leaves his surgery, Chief Inspector Japp believes it to be suicide - but Poirot has reason to think otherwise and embarks on his own investigation. Drama, starring David Suchet

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Part two of two. The detective now has a murder inquiry on his hands as the body found on the moors is identified as 11-year-old Andre Petri. With Kyle Heath still missing, Banks divides his team to search for a connection between the cases, and when post-mortem examinations show Andre was killed by a heroin overdose, it appears the two boys are linked by the illegal drug trade. Starring Stephen Tompkinson, with Andrea Lowe, Caroline Catz, Christine Bottomley and John Lightbody

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Julia McKenzie returns as the sleuthing spinster in the first of three murder mysteries. While staying at a hotel in the Caribbean, Miss Marple investigates the death of a fellow guest, refusing to believe he died of a heart attack. With the help of a business tycoon she sets about finding the real cause of the man's demise, and is soon drawn into a web of deceit and dark magic. Adapted by Charlie Higson and co-starring Antony Sher, Robert Webb, Montserrat Lombard, Daniel Rigby, Hermione Norris, MyAnna Buring, Warren Brown and Oliver Ford Davies

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Deirdre is amazed that Tracy does not seem excited about her wedding. Robert goes missing after his stag night. Curly tells Raquel he knows she has never loved him

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A fox-hunt turns sour when a tramp is found dead in the woods, and matters are further complicated by the murder of the chief suspect's father. As DCI Barnaby investigates, he concludes it is only a matter of time before another member of the tight-knit community suffers the same fate. Guest starring James Bolam

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: The discovery of a woman's body in a car park presents Jack Frost with another challenge to his deductive powers. Delving into the victim's electronic organiser, he learns she was connected with a local religious community - and realises someone in the congregation is more interested in the pleasures of this world than the rewards of the next. David Jason stars, with Bruce Alexander and John Lyons

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby's secret past as a spy is revealed when a former agent is killed after a cricket match between the villagers and the gentry. The dead man's wounds appear to have been inflicted by a giant claw, triggering rumours of a 'beast of Midsomer', and before long, another body turns up with similar injuries. Barnaby then realises the incidents are linked to the time the local network of spies spent in Cold War Berlin. John Nettles and Jason Hughes star, with guest appearances by Anna Massey, Peter Davison and Neil Stuke

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Part one of two. When the body of investigative journalist Matt Barber is found in a holiday chalet in a remote village, Banks and his team are initially confronted by an overwhelming number of leads. As the detective identifies a connection between the victim and a mysterious death in the 1980s connected to the surviving members of a cult rock band, he must begin to unpick decades of lies. To make matters worse, the deceased man's father is former senior police officer Jack Barber, who is now a candidate in the local commissioner elections - and Morton is convinced he is obstructing their inquiry. Stephen Tompkinson stars

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian sleuth contemplates retiring while on a trip to the Lake District, but shelves his plans when Hastings meets a woman whose collection of valuable miniature portraits has been stolen. David Suchet stars

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A crime wave hits Ashfordly train station as a number of freight wagons mysteriously vanish, giving the police a tricky case to crack, but a sandwich could provide a vital clue. Peggy has plans to make some fast money when she decides to play dirty in the local bowls tournament, while a night out in Whitby proves eventful for Walker and Helen. Rural drama, starring Gwen Taylor, Jonathan Kerrigan and Sophie Ward

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Rachel feels awkward when she sees Jack again. Kim attempts to impress Alex. Chris sees Lyn, Roy, Will and Kelly stealing a key to one of the holiday village chalets

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Rachel and Jack leave for the funeral in Sheffield. Kelly approaches Chris about a job in the office. Tony gets aggressive in the wine bar

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Judy fears that she might never conceive. Sean accuses Liz of spreading malicious rumours about him. Curly refuses to speak to Raquel

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Curly returns home to find all trace of Raquel gone, so he gets drunk and spends the evening wallowing in self-pity. Samantha is amazed to hear Sean and Liz are an item

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby visits his Aunt Alice, who is recovering from an operation at a nursing home, and finds himself in the middle of a mystery. A resident has been found dead and the official verdict is a heart attack, but as rumours of fraud and deception abound, Alice's friend believes someone may have conspired to commit murder

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: A student is attacked on campus, and Jack takes time off from questioning two robbery suspects to catch the thug responsible before he can strike again. The trail leads him to Boxborough - where a confrontation with a belligerent solicitor provides the clue he needs to crack the case. Starring David Jason, Bruce Alexander, John Lyons, Charlotte Bellamy and Tazmin Malleson

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Jones are called away from a team-building exercise to investigate a fatal explosion at a haulage yard in Calham Cross. The property is owned by Territorial Army commanding officer Matt Parkes, the father of a businessman whose ruthlessness in the boardroom is matched only by his behaviour toward women. To complicate matters, the village is also home to a peace protester and a grieving mother - and Barnaby has to decide if any of these locals is capable of arson and murder. John Nettles and Jason Hughes star, with Tim Pigott-Smith, Joseph Millson, Niamh Cusack, Judy Parfitt and Nick Fletcher

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Part two of two. With lawyer David Hornby now a suspect, Cabbot is forced to admit the father of her baby doesn't know about her pregnancy. She then discovers band member Martin Soames' confession in the John Gaunt case file is missing and that Matt Barber's father Jack was the original investigating officer, leading Helen to believe she has the evidence she needs to push the former policeman harder. But when Banks learns of a mysterious tape recording that appears to link Jack with the Crystal Kiss, he realises he's in a race to find it if he is to have any hope of uncovering the truth. Stephen Tompkinson stars

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth is called in to investigate when the UK's prime minister and his secretary are kidnapped in France. However, he has only a day and a half to solve the case before an important conference is set to take place. Drama, starring David Suchet

John Nettles and Jason Hughes star, with Tim Pigott-Smith, Joseph Millson, Niamh Cusack, Judy Parfitt and Nick Fletcher

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Part two of two. With lawyer David Hornby now a suspect, Cabbot is forced to admit the father of her baby doesn't know about her pregnancy. She then discovers band member Martin Soames' confession in the John Gaunt case file is missing and that Matt Barber's father Jack was the original investigating officer, leading Helen to believe she has the evidence she needs to push the former policeman harder. But when Banks learns of a mysterious tape recording that appears to link Jack with the Crystal Kiss, he realises he's in a race to find it if he is to have any hope of uncovering the truth. Stephen Tompkinson stars

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth is called in to investigate when the UK's prime minister and his secretary are kidnapped in France. However, he has only a day and a half to solve the case before an important conference is set to take place. Drama, starring David Suchet

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: A student is attacked on campus, and Jack takes time off from questioning two robbery suspects to catch the thug responsible before he can strike again. The trail leads him to Boxborough - where a confrontation with a belligerent solicitor provides the clue he needs to crack the case. Starring David Jason, Bruce Alexander, John Lyons, Charlotte Bellamy and Tazmin Malleson

programme.title: Minder

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Tara and Steed try and put all the pieces together when people start turning up dead in unique locations with a jigsaw puzzle piece placed on their persons. Peter Jeffrey guest stars

programme.title: French Open Tennis: Roland-Garros Live
programme.desc: Coverage of the second day of the Grand Slam, staged at Roland Garros in Paris, featuring first-round matches from both the men's and women's draws. Australia's Ashleigh Barty enters as the reigning women's champion, having opened her campaign last year with a 6-3, 6-3 victory over Jessica Pegula, one of four Americans she overcame before comfortably defeating the Czech Republic's Marketa Vondrousova in the final. John Inverdale presents, with analysis from Jim Courier, Marion Bartoli, Anne Keothavong, Mark Petchey, Sam Smith and Fabrice Santoro, commentary by Nick Mullins and Jonathan Overend, and reports from Celina Hinchcliffe

programme.title: The Equalizer (2014)
programme.desc: A retired secret agent applies his talents to the task of helping victims of injustice. When he witnesses a prostitute being beaten up by a pimp, he kills the man, an act that draws him into a battle to the death with a Russian crime syndicate. Action thriller based on the 1980s TV series, starring Denzel Washington and Chloe Grace Moretz

programme.title: Minder

programme.title: The Memoirs of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Two sisters receive unwanted gifts at Christmas - severed human ears. Holmes is enlisted to discover where they came from - and uncovers a disturbing tale of deceit and infidelity. Jeremy Brett stars in his curtain call as the famous detective

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Secrets are being leaked from the Cypher HQ. The employees however, insist that all has been normal. Steed and Tara look into a dubious window cleaning service to find out more

programme.title: French Open Tennis: Roland-Garros Live
programme.desc: Coverage of the third day of the Grand Slam, staged at Roland Garros in Paris, where the first-round matches in the men's and women's draws are scheduled to conclude. Day three in 2019 was one of few upsets, though top seed Naomi Osaka and defending champion Simona Halep both conceded a set in victories over Anna Karolina Schmiedlova and Ajla Tomljanovic respectively. In the men's competition, Alexander Zverev eventually defeated John Millman in five sets, and home favourite Gael Monfils comfortably defeated Taro Daniel 6-0, 6-4, 6-1. John Inverdale presents, with analysis from Jim Courier, Marion Bartoli, Anne Keothavong, Mark Petchey, Sam Smith and Fabrice Santoro, commentary by Nick Mullins and Jonathan Overend, and reports from Celina Hinchcliffe

programme.title: Cop Land (1997)
programme.desc: A naive, half-deaf man who longed to be a police officer instead becomes the sheriff of a small town that has become a safe community for New York cops. His hero worship of the locals is challenged when he discovers evidence of corruption, and is forced to choose between betraying his idols and upholding the law. Thriller, starring Sylvester Stallone, Harvey Keitel and Robert De Niro

programme.desc: Action from races 12, 13 and 14 of the season at Donington Park, where the drivers were looking to pick up crucial points as they visited the Leicestershire track.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: Action drama based on the film franchise. Grief-stricken after the loss of his wife and unborn child, ex-Navy Seal-turned-detective Martin Riggs moves to California to start afresh at the LAPD. He's paired up with veteran detective Roger Murtaugh, who's just coming back to the job after a near-fatal heart attack. Riggs' penchant for diving headfirst into the line of fire soon clashes with Murtaugh's prudent by-the-book technique and his life-on-the-edge attitude makes him a priority case for the department's psychologist. Clayne Crawford and Damon Wayans star

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: The duo try to track down an American colonel tormented by memories his harrowing experiences while in command of an air base in Vietnam. Robert Vaughn and Nyree Dawn Porter star

programme.title: French Open Tennis: Roland-Garros Live
programme.desc: Coverage of the fourth day of the Grand Slam, staged at Roland Garros in Paris, where the second-round matches in the men's and women's draws are scheduled to get under way. Roger Federer and Rafael Nadal were both typically dominant at this stage last year, recording straight-sets victories over Oscar Otte and Yannick Madden respectively. In the women's event, fourth seed Kiki Bertens retired hurt against Viktoria Kuzmova, while Karolina Pliskova comfortably avoided a further upset as she prevailed 6-2, 6-2 against Kristina Kucova. John Inverdale presents, with analysis from Jim Courier, Marion Bartoli, Anne Keothavong, Mark Petchey, Sam Smith and Fabrice Santoro, commentary by Nick Mullins and Jonathan Overend, and reports from Celina Hinchcliffe

programme.title: King of the Roads
programme.desc: The Scarborough Gold Cup. Action from England's only closed road race in Scarborough. Following the Barry Sheene Classic, it was the turn of the modern machines to compete

programme.title: Hulk (2003)
programme.desc: Scientist Dr Bruce Banner turns into the rampaging green Hulk after exposure to a huge dose of gamma radiation, prompting the military to embark on a no-holds-barred mission to destroy the monster. Meanwhile, Banner's unstable father resurfaces, holding the secret to his transformation. Comic-book adventure from director Ang Lee, starring Eric Bana, Jennifer Connelly, Sam Elliott and Nick Nolte

programme.desc: In this episode, 30-year-old Dan and 39-year-old Laura must undergo surgery while remaining awake, allowing the surgeons to map the functioning of their brains. programme.title: Grayson Perry's Big American Road Trip
programme.desc: Artist and social commentator Grayson Perry travels across the pre-pandemic US, spending time with people from all walks of life to explore the divisions across the nation - issues that have since been thrown into sharper focus. He begins in the American South, where he tackles race - arguably the oldest and most intractable division in the US. Travelling from Atlanta, Georgia, to Washington, DC, he explores older ideas of African American success with members of the so-called 'black elite' and reflects on the issue of white privilege

programme.desc: Part two of two. Sam fails to make an impression on the object of his desire, and Coach faces a tough test when the woman he loves dumps him after a big-money win on the lottery

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray tries to teach Ally a lesson by resuming the piano lessons he gave up 25 years earlier - and finds himself wondering why he ever stopped receiving tuition in the first place. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray tricks Debra into letting him play golf - but finds it difficult to put a good round together as he contends with a guilty conscience. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is shocked to discover his parents planned to divorce when he was a child, and only stayed together to help him recover from an accident. Tormented by the thought they have never really been happy together, he begins to blame himself for all the misery in their marriage

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles and Daphne impulsively marry while holidaying in Reno, but on their return they realise Frasier, Martin and Daphne's mother will be distraught if they find out they missed the event. Starring David Hyde Pierce and Jane Leeves

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The Crane brothers confront an unscrupulous car-park attendant over a matter of principle - and two dollars. Meanwhile, Daphne leaves Frasier's home for the last time, and realises how much Eddie and Martin are going to miss her. Kelsey Grammer stars

programme.desc: Platinum-selling, Grammy-nominated singer-songwriter, actor and author Jewel goes undercover to meet talented musicians and artists struggling to break through. The owner opened the establishment in 2001 with the help of her father but the business has failed to meet her expectations, and the chef realises that her ruthless style of management is having an adverse influence, not only on her staff but also on her family

programme.title: Steph's Packed Lunch

programme.desc: Couples try to outdo one another by throwing the perfect dinner party in Co Antrim. Finishing off the week are smallholders Mandy and Jim, who serve up a Filipino roast pig dish followed by baked Alaska

programme.title: The Simpsons

In the second episode, Grayson takes a bike trip down the relatively prosperous East Coast of the US, from the liberal holiday playground of Martha's Vineyard, Massachusetts, to a 'woke' enclave of Brooklyn, he explores issues of social class, economic opportunity and access to education, and tries to understand how America's liberals now view their own country

He also published a best-selling book - The Art of the Deal. However, as the decade drew to a close, Donald's life began to unravel

programme.desc: Joey and Chandler celebrate their last night as flatmates, and Ross claims he is too busy babysitting to help Monica as she frantically tries to arrange Rachel's packing before the removal firm arrives. Comedy, starring Matt LeBlanc and Matthew Perry

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: An Australian dancer (guest star Elle Macpherson) moves in with Joey and he struggles to refrain from flirting. Chandler tries to impress Monica by cleaning their flat, and Rachel is embarrassed by Phoebe's jogging style. Comedy, with Matt LeBlanc and Matthew Perry

programme.title: 5 News at 5
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Australian soap opera, charting the lives and loves of the residents of the suburb of Erinsborough

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Australian soap opera charting the latest comings and goings of the residents of Summer Bay

programme.title: 5 News Tonight
programme.desc: A round-up of the evening's headlines, including coverage of the latest national and international stories

programme.title: Chris Tarrant: Extreme Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Chris explores five countries that were part of Yugoslavia, which had an extensive state-run railway network before its break-up in the 1990s and the Balkan Wars of Independence that followed. From Slovenia, Chris heads east along an old Austro-Hungarian railway that was once used by the Orient Express, pays a visit to a very unusual railway-related battlefield in Bosnia and rides on one of the world's great mountain railways on his way to the Serbian capital Belgrade before finishing his journey in Montenegro

programme.title: Walking Britain's Roman Roads
programme.desc: Dan Jones explores Roman roads Dere Street, the northern-most Roman road in Britain running from York to Scotland, and Stanegate, a key east-west route that runs alongside the great defensive barrier of Hadrian's Wall. His journey reveals the story of Roman military and its colonial ambitions in Britain

programme.title: Lawrence of Arabia: Britain's Great Adventurer
programme.desc: The epic story of Thomas Edward Lawrence the First World War military officer who united the tribes of Arabia against the Ottoman Turkish army. The film reveals that while being one of the most enigmatic figures of the 20th century, he was also a deeply troubled man, delving into his personal torment, the secret his family were hiding, and the punishment he endured

programme.title: The Curse of King Tut
programme.desc: The 1922 discovery of Tutankhamun's tomb in Egypt's Valley of Kings remains one of the greatest archaeological finds of all time. But when Howard Carter broke through the sealed entrance to reveal thousands of priceless artefacts and the teenage body of the boy king, rumours of the Pharaoh's revenge consumed the media. And when Carter's benefactor Lord Carnarvon suddenly died, the belief that a deadly curse had been unleashed ran like wildfire. This documentary looks back at Carter and Carnarvon's discovery, and explores the truth behind the stories of the curse

programme.title: Flights from Hell
programme.desc: Footage of terrifying moments on board aircraft together with survivors' stories. Ice freezes the engine of a light aircraft, forcing the pilot to attempt a landing in a snow-covered field that masks a hidden danger

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: The 21.co.uk Live Casino Show
programme.desc: Interactive gambling

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: Pride thinks he has found a new link between Mayor Hamilton and the illegal activity in Clearwater when a Navy chaplain is murdered

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: Pride spies on one of Hamilton's accomplices, but he is spotted, leading to a shoot out in a crowded street

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: The team is unable to trust anyone in the city, so turn to the FBI for help in foiling the mayor's sinister scheme

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Property expert Ann Maurice offers advice to the owner of a four-bedroom Victorian villa in Garelochhead, Argyll and Bute. The house has been on the market for two months, and Ann thinks she knows why - it is far too cluttered with useless knick-knacks that are stopping the natural light from getting in

programme.title: Life Stories
programme.desc: A series of half hour programmes aimed at reflecting the interests, needs and aspirations of the sign language community

programme.title: Stalag 17 (1953)
programme.desc: The inmates of a German PoW camp are convinced there is a traitor in their midst when the guards seem to be forewarned of their escape attempts. An unassuming sergeant content to remain a captive until the end of the conflict becomes the focus of suspicion as mob mentality takes hold. Billy Wilder's Second World War drama, starring an Oscar-winning William Holden, with Don Taylor, Otto Preminger and Harvey Lembeck

programme.title: Donovan's Reef (1963)
programme.desc: An American soldier settles down with a friend and a kindly doctor on a South Sea island to relax in the aftermath of the Second World War. The arrival of the medic's snobbish daughter throws their idyllic life into turmoil, leaving them struggling to make her father seem respectable. Comedy drama directed by John Ford, starring John Wayne, Lee Marvin, Jack Warden, Elizabeth Allen and Cesar Romero

programme.title: The Dam Busters (1955)
programme.desc: The story of the destruction of the major dams in Germany's industrial heartland in the Ruhr valley in 1943, a mission that seemed impossible until engineer and scientist Barnes Wallis came up with the ingenious idea of bouncing bombs, and the pilots of 617 Squadron were trained to fly the crucial mission. Second World War drama, with Michael Redgrave, Richard Todd, Basil Sydney, Derek Farr and Ursula Jeans

programme.title: Sahara (2005)
programme.desc: An explorer stumbles upon evidence that an American Civil War battleship, which was laden with treasure when it sank without trace, has ended up somewhere in the Sahara. However, he is deflected from his mercenary quest to find the hoard by an encounter with a tenacious doctor, whose battle to stop the spread of a deadly disease could be linked to his own mission. Adventure, starring Matthew McConaughey, Penelope Cruz and Steve Zahn

programme.title: The Mountain Between Us (2017)
programme.desc: A London neurosurgeon desperate to attend an operation crosses paths with an American bride determined to get to her wedding. When their chartered flight crashes, they attempt to survive in the wilderness, while fighting their attraction to each other. Romantic adventure, starring Idris Elba, Kate Winslet and Beau Bridges

programme.title: Dark River (2017)
programme.desc: After receiving news of her father's death, travelling sheep-shearer Alice tentatively decides to return to the dilapidated family house of her childhood in muddy North Yorkshire for the first time in 15 years, hoping to claim the tenancy to the family farm she believes is rightfully hers. Period drama, starring Ruth Wilson, Mark Stanley and Sean Bean

programme.title: Joy (2015)
programme.desc: An imaginative youngster with dreams of being an inventor grows up to be a downtrodden single mother, struggling to support her chaotic family. She sees a chance to turn all their lives around when inspiration strikes and she creates a new household tool, but faces the challenge of selling her product in the demanding world of a home shopping TV station. Fact-based drama, starring Jennifer Lawrence, Robert De Niro and Bradley Cooper

programme.title: The Great Sioux Massacre (1965)
programme.desc: A corrupt senator coaxes Colonel Custer out of retirement with the prospect of presidential office, and the soldier tries to further his political ambitions by wresting control of the current military campaign from its commanding officer, culminating in his last stand at the Battle of the Little Bighorn. Western, with Philip Carey, Joseph Cotten, Darren McGavin and Julie Sommars

programme.title: The Long Memory (1952)
programme.desc: A man is released from prison after serving a 12-year sentence for a crime he did not commit, and immediately sets about tracking down three witnesses who lied in court, bringing about his conviction. However, while seeking revenge, he discovers the case is more complicated than expected. Thriller, starring John Mills, Elizabeth Sellars, John McCallum and Geoffrey Keen

programme.title: Hell Below Zero (1954)
programme.desc: A thrill-seeking explorer joins a whaling ship and is persuaded by the female captain to investigate the disappearance of her father on an earlier expedition. The pair become suspicious of her former lover - and are proved right when he leaves them for dead in Antarctic waters. Action adventure, starring Alan Ladd, Joan Tetzel, Basil Sydney and Stanley Baker

programme.title: Track of the Cat (1954)
programme.desc: A troubled family starts to fall apart during a harsh winter in 19th-century northern California while staving off the menacing presence of a predator - until a tragic accident finally brings matters to a head. Western melodrama, starring Robert Mitchum, Teresa Wright and Diana Lynn

programme.title: Risen (2016)
programme.desc: A Roman officer and his assistant are charged with investigating what became of Jesus' body following the crucifixion, as the Roman hierarchy fears stories of a resurrected Messiah may lead to an uprising in Jerusalem. However, what they discover during their search forces them to question everything they believe. Biblical drama, starring Joseph Fiennes and Tom Felton

programme.title: War for the Planet of the Apes (2017)
programme.desc: A devastating conflict erupts between humans and intelligent primates in a post-apocalyptic future. The leader of the apes is determined to make peace and prove his people are not savages - but a tragic course of events leaves him wrestling with a desire for revenge. Sci-fi adventure sequel, the conclusion of the trilogy of prequels to the 1968 movie. Starring Andy Serkis, Woody Harrelson and Steve Zahn

programme.title: Departure (2015)
programme.desc: A woman travels to the South of France with her teenage son to move all of their belongings out of their holiday home. While she faces up to the end of her marriage, he is struggling with his sexuality. The arrival of a mysterious young man forces them both to confront their personal desires and feelings toward each other. Drama, starring Juliet Stevenson and Alex Lawther

programme.title: Things to Come (2016)
programme.desc: A high-school philosophy teacher is forced to re-examine her life when her husband leaves her for another woman. Drama, starring Isabelle Huppert, Andre Marcon and Roman Kolinka. In French, German and English

programme.title: Dakota Incident (1956)
programme.desc: Mismatched travellers, including a bank robber, a politician and a dancing girl, are targeted by Cheyenne braves when their stagecoach is ambushed in the Dakota desert. When the coach is set on fire, they take cover in a gully, and a drawn-out conflict ensues. Western, starring Dale Robertson, Linda Darnell, John Lund and Ward Bond

programme.title: How to Murder Your Wife (1965)
programme.desc: A henpecked cartoonist publishes a comic strip depicting the murder of his new wife - who fears he is planning to bump her off for real. When she disappears without trace, he finds himself accused of murder. Comedy, starring Jack Lemmon, Virna Lisi, Terry-Thomas, Claire Trevor, Eddie Mayehoff and Sidney Blackmer

programme.title: Comanche Station (1960)
programme.desc: A cowboy recruits a trio of outlaws to rescue a woman held captive at a Comanche camp and reunite her with her husband in return for a large reward. However, his partners decide the bounty should be split three ways rather than four and plan to double-cross him. Western, starring Randolph Scott, Nancy Gates, Claude Akins and Skip Homeier

programme.title: This Happy Breed (1944)
programme.desc: A working-class family moves into a new suburban home after the father returns from service in the First World War. However, the couple and their children struggle to adjust to life higher up the social ladder. David Lean's drama, adapted by Noel Coward from his play, starring Robert Newton, Celia Johnson, Robert Stanley Holloway and John Mills

programme.title: The Madness of King George (1994)
programme.desc: British monarch George III's behaviour becomes increasingly erratic, prompting fears that he is going insane. While physicians try to uncover the cause of his condition, the king's enemies in Parliament and the frustrated Prince of Wales conspire to have him declared insane and removed from the throne. Period drama based on Alan Bennett's play, starring Nigel Hawthorne, Helen Mirren and Rupert Everett

programme.title: The Festival (2018)
programme.desc: When Nick's girlfriend dumps him at graduation, he has a colossal meltdown in front of the entire university. He's convinced his life is over, but his best mate Shane has the perfect solution - three days at a music festival. With the help of 'festival aficionado' and certified oddball Amy, Shane tries to get Nick to embrace the music, the mayhem and the mud. Comedy, starring Joe Thomas, Hannah Tointon, Hammed Animashaun and Jemaine Clement

programme.title: Rough Night (2017)
programme.desc: Things go terribly wrong for a group of girlfriends who hire a male stripper for a hen party in Miami. Comedy, starring Scarlett Johansson, Kate McKinnon and Zoe Kravitz

programme.title: Suntan (2016)
programme.desc: A middle-aged doctor moves to an island to make a fresh start, but becomes obsessed with a female patient half his age when she lets him tag along with her group of hard-partying friends. Drama, starring Makis Papadimitriou and Elli Tringou. In Greek and English

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: Man with a Plan

Will he be talking tall after their date?

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
