programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien are on the Wirral, where Simon has a plan to turn a chunky chain into a standard lamp and Henry picks up a 1963 Ford Anglia to get it back to its best

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: The team is near Preston, where Simon O'Brien restores a spotlight he believes may be from a German U-boat while Henry Cole gets creative with an aircraft jump seat

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: The Strawbridge family heads to the beaches of Saint-Malo with Angel's parents to seek out chateau inspiration. Ithaca and Alex's fundraiser in northern France is a logistical nightmare, but becomes a hot ticket. First impressions are important to Angela and Steve, who get stuck in a last-minute fix as they try to restore their chateau's electric gates before the first rental guests of the season arrive

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton meets Kent couple Tracie and Craig, who plan to knock down Tracie's childhood bungalow to build a contemporary home with a glass atrium centrepiece. However, budget restrictions and a series of setbacks look set to spell an end to their dream, leaving the upbeat pair to focus their attentions on transforming their garden shed into a bar

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at Langsmeade House in Thame, Oxfordshire, where Dutch-born owner Marianne Abben and her housekeeper Fran Birch hope to demonstrate that their B&B offers the best value for money. The quirky pair's hosting style proves a hit with some of their guests, before others reveal their competitive side during a Charleston dance lesson

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners visit the Stratford House Guesthouse in Stratford-upon-Avon on their second outing, where couple Natasha and Dai Pollock hope to impress their peers. But things do not run smoothly, as the guests are left unimpressed with the decor and discover nasty surprises in some of the drawers

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third B&B of the week is pet-friendly Edmund House in Deal, Kent, where owner Michael Prime is joined by his mum Lorna. On arrival, Marianne Abben and Fran Birch love the seaside-inspired room, but entrepreneur Mark Genders is far from thrilled by the 'no frills' experience. Over dinner, tensions run high after self-confessed trouble-maker Marianne asks Mark to reveal which of the group he would and would not employ, and Lorna gets short shrift when she puts forward her application

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Entrepreneur Mark Genders welcomes the contestants to the Five Bells Pub in Berkshire and hopes they will approve of his small but perfectly formed rooms. He organises an ale-tasting activity, although it fails to please all of his guests. Michael and Lorna admit they have seen a new side of Mark - however, will it affect their feedback?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners settle some scores and discover how much they have been paid, before the winner is revealed. Marianne and Fran from Langsmeade House begin by explaining that their worn rug is in fact a 200-year-old antique, Natasha and Dal from Stratford House confront Michael and Lorna about their strong language and cleaning techniques, while Mark Genders compares his experience at Edmund House to flying with a low budget airline

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Keepers introduce elderly chameleon Mr Parsons to two new prospective partners, and bongo Malaeka shows little interest in her potential mate, Moti. Meanwhile in the aquarium, George the pinstripe damba is spotted in distress, and keepers notice a lump on his gill which may be affecting his breathing

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet Alex and Danny Moore in Preston, and offer the pair advice on whether they should renovate their home or put it on the market. Danny wants to do up the property and sell it on, but Alex has other ideas, and thinks the house is the perfect place for them to start a family

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Documentary following Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree through the process of buying and restoring a French chateau that has been empty for the past four decades. Their new home has 12 acres of land, nine outbuildings, a walled garden and a moat - but it also has no electricity, heating or water, and proves to be a far more complicated DIY project than expected

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud revisits a prefabricated-home project in west Cumbria to find out whether Alan and Judith Dawson are happy with the finished product. The couple employed a method of building that allowed them to assemble the property in just 15 days on a budget of £300,000, but with so much attention given to the speed of construction, there was little time to think how the house might be to live in

programme.title: Inside the Spitfire Factory
programme.desc: Documentary following Peter Monk and his crew over the course of a year as they try to restore the rusting remains of a 1943 Mark IX Spitfire to its former glory

programme.title: Guy Martin's Spitfire
programme.desc: In May 1940, a Mark 1 Spitfire was shot down and crash-landed on a beach in northern France, where it slowly sank into the sand. The wreckage was finally recovered in the 1980s and stored in France for more than 20 years. In this programme, motorcycle racer and mechanic Guy Martin joins a two-year project to rebuild the aeroplane, revealing the engineering and skills involved, and providing a fitting homage to the bravery of everyone involved in its service

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: A compilation of the best bits from recent series with host Jimmy Carr, team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson, and Countdown regulars Susie Dent and Rachel Riley, joined by a host of top comedians including Alan Carr, Richard Ayoade, Kathy Burke, Roisin Conaty, Joe Wilkinson, Johnny Vegas, Katherine Ryan, Phil Wang, Aisling Bea and David Mitchell

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Becky, 59, is rushed in after a suspected stroke, and medics are concerned she may have had a bleed on the brain. Georgia, 19, locked herself out of her flat and lost her balance trying to climb through a second-floor window, falling 20ft on to concrete. She's sent for an urgent CT scan with possible spinal injuries. Meanwhile, 88-year-old Edith is kept under observation after collapsing at home

programme.title: Inside the Spitfire Factory
programme.desc: Documentary following Peter Monk and his crew over the course of a year as they try to restore the rusting remains of a 1943 Mark IX Spitfire to its former glory

programme.title: Inside the Zoo: Down Under
programme.desc: Vets have to perform emergency surgery on a tree goanna after a member of the public brings it into the wildlife hospital with a particularly unusual injury

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman helps childhood sweethearts Michelle and Fred find their dream holiday home on Gran Canaria. Michelle and Fred fell in love with the island after holidaying there over 20 years ago, and now the time is right to use their £190,000 budget to find somewhere where they can bring Michelle's mother and their three grandsons to enjoy too

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: The team is in Hay-on-Wye and Bedford, where Henry restores a bespoke workbench, and Simon ponders the possibilities of some discarded planks of wood

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien restores an enamel roll-top bath and builds a den out of old doors. Henry Cole makes a wall mounted safe from a jerry can and lovingly restores a cheese-making trough

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge visits Philip and Angelina and helps them build a bridge at their chateau - will Dick's design work? Jonathan and Michael test the services they provide at their chateau by inviting Michael's old college mates for the weekend, while Jonny and Ashley continue the search for their dream chateau

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton meets Cumbrian couple Andy and Amy, who plan to build a huge four-bedroom home with a farmhouse feel. Despite having previously self-built twice before, the presenter worries Andy may have bitten off more than he can chew this time around

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at Trecarne House in Liskeard, Cornwall, where owners Trish and Tom Brock-Morgan hope to demonstrate that their B&B offers the best value for money. The pair win the group's admiration by sharing their life story, but one guest stirs up intrigue by holding his cards close to his chest

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners spend their second night of the competition at the Magna Carta at Windsor in Berkshire, a five-star floating bed and breakfast run by Captain Dominic Read. The guests are pleasantly surprised upon arrival, but not all are impressed by the standard of the accommodation - and a cracked teapot at the breakfast table leads to trouble for the proprietor

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third B&B of the week is Ash Cottage near Leeds Castle in Kent, where the unusual decor is an eye-opener for the guests but is not everyone's cup of tea. Trish and Tom get heated over the instant coffee before owners Rayne and Chris Deal take their fellow contestants to Chatham Dockyard to try their hands at rope-making

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final guest house of the week is A Room with a View in Brighton, where owner Stephen Bull and housekeeper Joanna Harris hope their nine-room establishment will impress the contestants. Things get off to a good start when Rayne and Chris Deal are impressed by the cleanliness of the property, but things take a turn for the worse when breakfast gets the thumbs down

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners come together to confront their critics face-to-face. Hosts of Trecarne House in Cornwall Trish and Tom Brock-Morgan raise issues with Magna Carta's Dominic Read on his mark for their hosting, while he has a bone to pick with them over criticism of his five-star floating B&B. Stephen and Joanna of A Room with a View in Brighton receive complaints about their breakfast, and tensions run high as the payments are revealed and the winner is announced

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: The fly-on-the-cage-wall documentary returns after a Christmas break. Dominant chimpanzee Dylan is distracted by the females, giving a new generation of males the opportunity to challenge the pecking order. Pudu couple Serena and Odin have a new arrival - but big brother Lucas seems intent on terrorising his new sister - and there is a battle for survival in the aquarium among the Indian mudskipper fish, who can exist both in and out of water

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet the Lindleys from Ashtead, Surrey. Having built up his business empire from home, cyber security expert Bill has inadvertently taken over their detached bungalow, and retired civil servant Pippa has had enough. She dreams of moving to Kent, where they can be closer to family and the coast

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Angel Adoree advises Jonathan and Michael on how to make their chateau wedding business work. Then it's crunch time for the pair as they try to persuade an American couple to book a big-money wedding with them. Meanwhile, Phil and Angelina clear their garden for a wedding anniversary party, but struggle to dispose of the debris. Elsewhere, Johnny and Ashley view two properties as they search for a dream chateau

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud revisits a couple who took on the task of constructing a sustainable two-storey timber house in the Kent countryside, heated by glass panels. Mimi da Costa managed the project despite a lack of experience, while her husband Andre worked and looked after the children, intending to have it completed in 16 weeks. But as the complex build threatened to drag on for months, it became unclear whether their home would succeed in blending into the landscape and provide them with a greener, healthier lifestyle

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The hospital documentary returns, focusing on the stories of two motorcyclists, which reveal how the bonds between loved ones can be strengthened through adversity. Prezmek may have life-changing spinal injuries following a high-speed motorcycle crash on the M4, forcing his wife Tatia to reflect on how their plans for the future may have to change. Teenager Leon undergoes a CT scan after crashing into a central reservation. While waiting for the results, his mother Janey thinks back to his school days

programme.title: The Mum Who Got Tourette's
programme.desc: Elizabeth is a typical suburban housewife and mother of three with one big difference - without warning, shortly after her 40th birthday, she developed Tourette's syndrome - a neurological condition that causes involuntary tics, some of them offensive. This one-off documentary follows Elizabeth and her family over the course of a busy summer, including a holiday in Cornwall, GCSE results and meeting her son's new girlfriend - experiences amplified by the unexpected impact of Elizabeth's condition

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: A compilation of the best bits from recent series with host Jimmy Carr, team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson, and Countdown regulars Susie Dent and Rachel Riley, joined by a host of top comedians including Alan Carr, Richard Ayoade, Kathy Burke, Roisin Conaty, Joe Wilkinson, Johnny Vegas, Katherine Ryan, Phil Wang, Aisling Bea and David Mitchell

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Yanni's in Seattle, where he clashes with defiant owner Peter Avgoustiou, a chef so set in his ways that he hasn't allowed any changes to his menu since the Greek restaurant opened in 1984. Peter's family is concerned the business is becoming trapped in the past, and standards are slipping, but he seems determined to stick to his guns

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The hospital documentary returns, focusing on the stories of two motorcyclists, which reveal how the bonds between loved ones can be strengthened through adversity. Prezmek may have life-changing spinal injuries following a high-speed motorcycle crash on the M4, forcing his wife Tatia to reflect on how their plans for the future may have to change. Teenager Leon undergoes a CT scan after crashing into a central reservation. While waiting for the results, his mother Janey thinks back to his school days

programme.title: The Mum Who Got Tourette's
programme.desc: Elizabeth is a typical suburban housewife and mother of three with one big difference - without warning, shortly after her 40th birthday, she developed Tourette's syndrome - a neurological condition that causes involuntary tics, some of them offensive. This one-off documentary follows Elizabeth and her family over the course of a busy summer, including a holiday in Cornwall, GCSE results and meeting her son's new girlfriend - experiences amplified by the unexpected impact of Elizabeth's condition

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Kate Quilton learns how coconut oil is extracted in Vietnam before heading to the English seaside, where she commandeers a mobile chip van to find out which oil is the healthiest. Jimmy Doherty is in Italy to find out what goes into a supermarket jar of artichoke hearts, while Matt Tebbutt discovers whether absinthe can really lead to hallucinations and madness

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Kirstie's Vintage Gems
programme.desc: Master sculptor and gilder Adam Williamson teaches Kirstie Allsop how to apply gold leaf to a second-hand picture frame to give it a luxury look and feel

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman helps house hunters Sue and Ray search for a retirement home on the Spanish island of Lanzarote, showing them five properties for their budget of £130,000

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien visit Herefordshire and Worcestershire. Henry makes a table from the base of a broken agricultural grain mill, while Simon creates a garden seat from an old mangle

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: The team visits Swindon and Chippenham, where Henry Cole finds and restores a much-maligned BSA Ariel 3 moped and Simon O'Brien gives a Ford Transit gearbox a new lease of life

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: The plumbers race to install basic heating and water as Dick, Angel and the Strawbridge family decide it's time to move into their crumbling chateau. They'll be sharing their new home with bats, birds and thousands of flies, but Angel is in love with their new home and the clan begins the process of adjusting to French country life

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton is commissioned by Tara Murphy and Dimitri Daras to build a thermally efficient house on a tight budget in the Cotswolds. However, a landslide puts plans in jeopardy and he begins to think the tricky hillside plot may be more trouble that it is worth

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is Nateby Inn in Cumbria, where landlady Gaynor Walker is ready with a warm welcome. A trip to Gaynor's local brewery turns out to be a barrel of laughs when one guest beats another in a cask-rolling competition, before a broken cooker creates chaos in the kitchen the following morning

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners visit the Outfields Farm Bed and Breakfast in Ravensden, Bedfordshire, on their second stay, where proprietors Graham and Julia Ashley treat them to an afternoon of indoor sky-diving before hosting a dinner filled with surprises. The guests enjoy a good night's sleep, but one of the owners is expecting hassle at breakfast time

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to At Home in Chiswick, west London, where artist Bob Osbourne appears to take a rather laid-back approach to running his B&B. On arrival, guests are pleasantly surprised by their first impressions of the communal living space-come-mini art gallery - but it's not long before they are dishing the dirt

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition draws to a close at the Ammonite Lodge guesthouse in Chard, Somerset, where owners Andrew and Clare Ashmore hope to excite their guests with a game of skittles. During the final dinner of the week, the competitors discuss their first impressions of each other, and Bob and Julia share some amusing observations with the group

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners confront their critics face to face, and the winners are announced. Nateby Inn host Gaynor takes issue with Graham and Julia's reduced marks for cobwebs. The conversation becomes heated when Outfields Farm's owners tackle Gaynor's complaints in return, and Georgie jumps to their defence. Artist Bob Osborne has a long list of grievances he wants to address, and Julia is left cringing when her previous comments rebound on her

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Chester Zoo's hornbills have survived a fire that swept through their home, but it may have derailed their plans for chicks, while meerkat matriarch Huskie seems to have lost her breeding instincts after losing her solitary pup nine months ago. Is she finally ready to be a mum again? Sun bear Milli already has her paws full bringing up her feisty daughter Kyra. However, the one-year-old's cuteness belies her devilish and destructive nature

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer are in Larne in Northern Ireland with Catherine and Nigel Finch, who have been married for seven years, but lately have hit a spot of turbulence due to their dated, 1970s-style bungalow. Nigel quickly fell for their rural location's incredible views, but Catherine has never loved the place and misses having neighbours, so Phil searches for a home that pleases them both, offering room for Nigel's beloved chickens, while giving Catherine more people around her

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Angel Adoree insists that Dick Strawbridge smash a hole through one of the castle's three-foot-thick interior walls to create a honeymoon suite, but he has far too much to do on his own and the schedule slips, badly

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows the progress of architectural designer Lincoln Miles and his wife, artist Lisa Traxler, who want to create their own home on the Isle of Wight. They have bought a property on a prime piece of land and set out to convert it into a creative structure that harmonises with the unspoilt woodland setting

programme.title: The Imitation Game (2014)
programme.desc: Biopic of mathematician Alan Turing, whose work during the Second World War translated seemingly unbreakable Nazi codes as well as pioneering the development of computer technology. In the years following the war, his life would be destroyed as his homosexuality was discovered, leaving him facing criminal charges. Starring Benedict Cumberbatch, Keira Knightley and Charles Dance

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Cora, 62, arrives by air ambulance following a high-speed road accident, which left her trapped in the car for more than an hour. Her husband Rae, 65, who was driving, is brought in soon after, and staff are concerned he may have sustained serious head, neck and internal injuries. Scott, 23, has badly cut his knee after a night out, and while he's being treated, he reflects on his schizophrenia diagnosis as a teenager. Retired carpenter Richard, 68, has fallen and hit his head on the pavement, but medics also want to look into his unusually low blood pressure

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Regulars including hitherto perennial host Jimmy Carr are nudged to one side as Canadian comedian Katherine Ryan hosts an all-female edition of the words-and-numbers quiz, inviting Roisin Conaty and Jessica Hynes to take on Sara Pascoe and Lolly Adefope, original shown as part of a celebration of 100 years of women's suffrage. As usual, Rachel Riley is at the letters and numbers board, while Morgana Robinson appears in character as EastEnders' Natalie Cassidy alongside wordsmith Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: In Co Durham, medics try to keep a man alive after he has a seizure. A fun day goes wrong at a motocross track when a 12-year-old suffers a limb-threatening injury

programme.title: Shocking Emergency Calls
programme.desc: Crowds cheer the runners in the Boston Marathon, but as they near the finishing line, two bombs are detonated. In Bristol, a neighbour calls 999 after finding a man covered in acid

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty, Kate Quilton and Matt Tebbutt present more of their favourite investigations. Jimmy learns that Greek yoghurt production creates a potentially devastating by-product, Kate heads deep into the Amazon rainforest to find out what gives red Leicester cheese its colour and Matt asks why ostrich meat is red when other poultry is white

programme.title: Modern Wheels or Classic Steals
programme.desc: Two classic and two modern convertibles are pitted against each other, as Elo and Rebecca try to find something stylish and sexy to meet Katie's requirements

programme.title: Modern Wheels or Classic Steals
programme.desc: Rebecca Jackson and Elo help a car buyer look for the perfect 4x4, and the vehicle must be suitable for the buyer's canine companions

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank find a huge sculpture of Elvis and trawl through a trailer full of rare art and military memorabilia

programme.title: Storage Hunters UK
programme.desc: US host Sean Kelly oversees UK bidders in Essex battling to win potential treasures found in storage containers, lock-ups and garages

programme.title: Storage Hunters UK

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys try to negotiate with a collector who demands a high price for every item up for sale, and check out a collection of Western memorabilia

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank explore a 135-year-old opera house full of memorabilia, and try to negotiate with a fellow picker charging a high price for his merchandise

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Race
programme.desc: Coverage from Barcelona of an event where teams create vehicles without engines and race downhill

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: In an edition first broadcast in 2007, Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May celebrate British Leyland's 40th birthday by trying to boost the reputation of the cars that once rolled off its production line. The Aston Martin DBS is put through its paces on the test track, Jennifer Saunders is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car and the team asks whatever happened to the beach buggy

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Motor racing driver Lewis Hamilton demonstrates his abilities on the test track, and Richard Hammond tries his hand in a Formula One car. Jeremy Clarkson and James May assess historic vehicles to establish which one pioneered the control layout used in modern cars, and singer-songwriter James Blunt is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Rick Stein's Far Eastern Odyssey
programme.desc: The chef ends his exploration of the Far East's most diverse food cultures by visiting Bangladesh, sampling the curry on offer in the country that has played a major role in establishing the success of Indian restaurants throughout the UK

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The team takes the BMW M3, Mercedes-Benz C63 AMG and Audi RS4 to Spain for a thorough test of performance. David Tennant is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car, James May drives a Jaguar XF and Richard Hammond wonders what happened to that ultimate symbol of 1960s grooviness - the beach buggy

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, James May and Richard Hammond take on a challenge to find an alternative to the expensive diesel-fuelled hatchbacks driven by British police officers. Alan Carr and Justin Lee Collins take up the gauntlet as the Stars in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Jo Brand demonstrates an impressive grasp of street slang, Katy Wix uses a long part of her body to steal something sweet and David Baddiel takes a sledgehammer to a tricky problem

programme.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
programme.desc: Lolly Adefope, Dan Walker, Sarah Greene and Miles Jupp go toe-to-toe testing their general knowledge skills in a variety of entertaining trivia-based games across the week

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon hosts a festive edition of the comedy panel show in which the participants aim to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves in a bid to secure a team victory. Joining team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack for the Christmas fun are former Test Match Special commentator Henry Blofeld, Witless star Kerry Howard, broadcaster the Rev Richard Coles and BBC News presenter Clive Myrie. They all reveal amazing stories, but are they telling the truth, or making it all up?

programme.desc: Drew Pritchard wants to stand out from the competition in Britain. He and friend Tee head to Italy hoping to find some antiques that his rivals won't be able to match

programme.title: Carabao Cup on Quest
programme.desc: Match highlights of all the action from the Carabao Cup

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers

programme.title: Combat Dealers
programme.desc: Military equipment collector Bruce Crompton recreates a D-Day parachute jump in a genuine Second World War uniform

programme.title: American Chopper

OCC heads to Phoenix, Arizona to surprise the winner, who they befriend in an effort to gain inspiration for the chopper. Once back in the shop, the guys get to work turning this fan's bike fantasy into reality

programme.title: Mighty Trains
programme.desc: Teddy Wilson takes a breath-taking train journey through Norway. He witnesses stunning scenery and deadly landscapes on the Bergen Railway and Nordland Line

programme.title: Mighty Ships
programme.desc: The capabilities of the Cristobal Colon, which can dredge millions of cubic metres of sand from the sea floor for delivery to construction sites

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: The manufacturing processes behind yacht wheels, braided rugs, car thermostats and chisels

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: The manufacture of ball bearings, electric violins, photographs and welding electrodes, and how the processes have evolved over the years

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: NHS manager Helen Mather holds the first party in Leicester, hoping her plans for a simple menu will allow her more time to entertain her guests. However, the accident-prone host has a mishap involving raw pig's blood, and tries to turn the evening around with some 'urban ballet' after one diner sours the mood with a display of less-than-polite table manners

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Estate agent Terry Robinson hosts the second dinner party in Leicester with a 'Dress as Your Hero' theme, and the Elton John fan also decides to treat his guests to a song. He is confident his menu will score him top marks, but while Richard is blown away, Ryan remains unimpressed

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Beauty spa manager Porchia Lee hosts the third dinner party in Leicester, serving up a French-themed menu of chicken liver pate, pan-fried chicken with tarragon sauce and creme brulee. Unfortunately for her the pudding is so bad her guests are reduced to tears, and double glazing salesman Richard Deeping insults her appearance

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: IT enthusiast Ryan Bruce hosts the fourth dinner party in Leicester, and tries to impress his guests with a Spanish-inspired menu cooked in front of them. Entertainment is provided by Ryan's sister, West End actress Charlie Bruce, who puts the contestants through their paces in a salsa lesson

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Double-glazing salesman Richard Deeping hosts the final dinner party in Leicester, and hopes to make up for his boisterous behaviour by impressing the guests with his culinary prowess. In a bid to land higher scores, he puts on his own brand of entertainment, only to reveal a little too much of himself in the process, before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Scarlette Douglas helps Michelle and David from Liverpool search for a holiday home on Spain's Costa del Sol with a budget of £60,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Young-at-heart couple Natalie and Andy Ray love Florida for its fun-filled attractions and weather, and are looking for a future family holiday home there. Ben Hillman tempts them with five homes within easy reach of the theme parks, all within their budget of £280,000

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Kennels owner Dean Faulkner is keen to impress as he hosts the first dinner party in Cambridge, where his guests are beauty school co-ordinator Kay Greenwood, gardening enthusiast Matt Sullivan, headstrong international development manager Hawa Sydique and the Beatles-obsessed Dave Goodier

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien travel to East Sussex in their hunt to discover valuable items 'lost' in people's homes, with their finds including some Victorian street lamps

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra comes down with a bad case of flu and takes to her bed, forcing Ray to look after her and the kids. Unfortunately for him, a meeting with a star quarterback complicates matters. Guest starring Terry Bradshaw

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray becomes envious of Robert's good looks and decides the time has come to get a head-to-toe makeover, complete with fake tan. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Mojito, a Cuban cafe in Brooklyn, New York. The restaurant was the shared dream of two newlyweds who have separated since its opening, and whose constant public quarrelling is distracting staff and driving customers away

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The owners of Jack's Waterfront at St Clair Shores in Michigan are keen to hear the fiery chef's advice for turning their failing seafood restaurant around. The lakeside location is a popular summer spot with fantastic views, but an uninspiring menu and a manager more skilled at socialising than organising are preventing them from achieving year-round success

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Craig and his daughter Holly are pooling their resources to buy a property in their favourite holiday destination - Majorca. They love the beach and the great outdoors and want to be as close to the coast as possible. With a budget of £180,000, Danni Menzies sets out to find their ideal property

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jonnie Irwin goes house hunting in and around the Spanish town of Chiclana de la Frontera on the Costa de la Luz with Steve and Janice

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: A special programme celebrating the show's 20th anniversary, as Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer look back over two decades of house-hunting together. In this episode, the pair reminisce about some of their previous house-hunting missions where lifestyle needed to be balanced with business. Champion dog trainer Lauren needed land for her collies, while parents Carole and Alan wanted adjoining buildings to set up a holiday rental business.

programme.title: George Clarke's National Trust Unlocked
programme.desc: The presenter heads to one of Britain's grandest 17th-century powerhouses - the decadent Ham House - and learns about the remarkable matriarchs who put it on the map, before exploring the Thames-side formal gardens that surround it. Plus, George has a private tour at the modernist Hampstead home of one of his heroes - architect Erno Goldfinger, the man thought to have inspired James Bond's nemesis

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Shows under review are Get Organized with The Home Edit, Ratched, EastEnders, The Andrew Marr Show with Keir Starmer, Yorkshire Tea vs PG Tips: Battle of the Brews, The Great British Bake Off, The Third Day and Politics Live with the PM's address to the House of Commons

programme.title: Inside the Bomb Squad
programme.desc: Members of the Army's EOD and Search Regiment head to the Isle of Man, where police believe they have found a bomb-making factory in a garage, while Sgt David Podmore investigates when the coastguard reports a possible torpedo on a Wirral beach

programme.title: Trump: An American Dream
programme.desc: Documentary charting Donald Trump's extraordinary journey through five decades as businessman, developer, media star and politician before reaching the White House. The series also considers how the president's rise reflects the story of modern America - one of capitalism, celebrity, reality TV and social media

programme.title: Council House Britain
programme.desc: Housing officer Charmain helps pensioner Mr Holland, a former shipbuilder whose flat is in a state of disrepair and is unable to do the work himself after taking a tumble. Meanwhile, ex-council tenant Max's estate is also undergoing major renovations. But having bought his flat through right-to-buy scheme and paid off his mortgage, the council now has to bill him an enormous £121,000 for his share of the essential, multi-million-pound works. In the pest department, Andy and Wayne tackle a derelict shop over-run with rats

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Matt Lucas takes over from Sandi Toksvig as host for the 2020 series, alongside returning presenter Noel Fielding and regular judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith. The 12 contestants for this series have been required to form a social bubble due to Covid-19 lockdown restrictions. The contest begins with Cake Week, beginning with a signature challenge to produce a classic Battenberg. For the technical round, Paul sets the contestants the task of making a fruit sponge, and the final Showstopper Challenge gives the bakers a chance to express their creativity

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off: An Extra Slice
programme.desc: Companion show to baking contest, featuring unseen footage from the programme and an interview with the week's eliminated baker. Jo Brand welcomes presenter AJ Odudu and Extra Slice favourite Richard Osman to discuss the new bubble of bakers and get stuck into Cake Week. Plus, comedian and regular contributor Tom Allen invites an array of home-bakers to bravely present him with their delights

programme.title: Jamie: Keep Cooking Family Favourites
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver demonstrates a new way to use sustainable white fish, rustling up fishcakes poached in milk and chives to create a vibrant green sauce. The chef and his son Buddy take a simple ice-cream and dress it up to create a dessert the kids will love to get their hands on, while Jamie creates his take on a peri-peri chicken

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Natasha Conti hosts the first dinner party in Salisbury, Wiltshire, and puts together an evening on the theme of a summer fete, complete with prizes for her fellow competitors. However, as the guests get to know each other, Chris Hiller finds himself in an awkward situation

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Farm manager Sophie McConnell hopes that her pig-racing entertainment will impress the guests on her night as host in Salisbury, Wiltshire. She also plans to serve her home-raised cow Levi for the main course

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Anthony Brown-Hovelt hosts the third dinner party in Salisbury, Wiltshire, and his menu includes Uzbekistani food and porridge ice-cream. The former army major dresses as an American sailor, but Natasha Conti does not find the outfit as appealing as she had hoped

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Housing support officer Chris Hiller plans an eclectic but affordable menu for his night in Salisbury, Wiltshire, including chicken a l'orange and peppers stuffed with baked beans. However, with the sole focus being on keeping costs low, his efforts might not go down well with the other guests

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Care worker Jane Arnold hosts the final dinner party in Salisbury, Wiltshire, hoping to impress her guests with food from her local area. However, it is her bedroom revelations that catch the diners' attentions, before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Paul and Debbie from Staffordshire want a holiday home on the island of Fuerteventura, so Ben Hillman lines up five properties near the coastal town of Caleta de Fuste

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Hyacinth Miller from London first visited Barbados 14 years ago, and now that she's retired, wants to permanently relocate there and spend time in the garden. With her son Leon along to help choose the right property, Jasmine Harman shows Hyacinth five properties in the south of the island, but do any of them have her packing her bags for a new life in the sun?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Beauty school co-ordinator Kay Greenwood hosts the second dinner party in Cambridge, hoping her tempura prawns and beef stroganoff will win her the £1,000 prize. One guest is sceptical about her chances of success, but changes his mind when he samples her unique entertainment

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Experts Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien travel Britain to find, fix and flog unwanted possessions on behalf of their owners, turning items into hard cash. A butter churn, a slot machine and a set of print trays are among the finds in this edition

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra learns the second-hand car she bought from Marie and Frank was once the scene of an amorous encounter for a teenage Ray - and promptly decides she does not want it any more. Patricia Heaton and Ray Romano star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray discovers the stone in Debra's engagement ring is a fake, and decides to get it changed without telling her - only to learn afterwards that she had beaten him to the punch and had her grandmother's $15,000 diamond put in. Meanwhile, Robert decides to surprise his new girlfriend with a change of hair colour

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits PJ's Steakhouse in Queens, New York, to provide his expert advice to the owners. They decided to turn a successful bar into a high-end restaurant, but without any previous experience in managing a business they have found themselves seriously in debt. With an over-confident chef and a partner propping up the bar, co-owner Madalyn faces a few difficult decisions

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Fiery chef Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of the owners of Hannah & Mason's, a French bistro in Cranbury, New Jersey. Members of staff complain their pay cheques bounce, and the kitchen cooler is so unhygienic that Gordon makes the decision to close the restaurant on Valentine's Day - the busiest night of the year

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman shows five properties to recently retired West Sussex couple Alison and Martin, who are looking to buy a holiday home along Spain's Costa Dorada

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman helps a woman from Cornwall with £170,000 to spend to find a holiday home in Funchal, capital of Madeira, a city she has visited repeatedly over the past 10 years

programme.title: Scotland's Scenic Railways
programme.desc: A look at the people who work on Scotland's railways and steam enthusiasts who safeguard these iconic routes. They include train conductor Suzie Sangan, whose social media posts celebrate one of the world's most beautiful railway lines. Cameras also focus on engineers abseiling beneath the Forth Bridge to carry out essential checks on one of the world's most famous UNESCO Heritage sites. And there's a trip to Blair Castle for the pipes and pageantry of the Atholl Highland Gathering

programme.title: Grayson Perry's Big American Road Trip
programme.desc: Artist and social commentator Grayson Perry travels across the pre-pandemic US, spending time with people from all walks of life to explore the divisions across the nation - issues that have since been thrown into sharper focus. He begins in the American South, where he tackles race - arguably the oldest and most intractable division in the US. Travelling from Atlanta, Georgia, to Washington, DC, he explores older ideas of African American success with members of the so-called 'black elite' and reflects on the issue of white privilege

programme.title: Trump: An American Dream
programme.desc: Documentary charting Donald Trump's extraordinary journey through five decades as businessman, developer, media star and politician before reaching the White House. The series also considers how the president's rise reflects the story of modern America - one of capitalism, celebrity, reality TV and social media

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Matt Lucas and Noel Fielding present Biscuit Week. For the Showstopper round, they are challenged to create an elaborate table setting made entirely from biscuits, before judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith decide who will be crowned Star Baker and who will be leaving the contest this week

programme.title: The Write Offs
programme.desc: Part two of two. After 12 weeks of intensive study, Sandi Toksvig brings her group of adult learners together in London to perform a pantomime, which presents the challenge of learning scripts and reading aloud. Martin Kemp, who was diagnosed with dyslexia in 1995 after two brain tumours, is on hand to offer some acting advice before the show goes on in front of a live audience at the Globe

programme.title: George Clarke's National Trust Unlocked
programme.desc: The presenter heads to one of Britain's grandest 17th-century powerhouses - the decadent Ham House - and learns about the remarkable matriarchs who put it on the map, before exploring the Thames-side formal gardens that surround it. Plus, George has a private tour at the modernist Hampstead home of one of his heroes - architect Erno Goldfinger, the man thought to have inspired James Bond's nemesis

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet Alex and Danny Moore in Preston, and offer the pair advice on whether they should renovate their home or put it on the market. Danny wants to do up the property and sell it on, but Alex has other ideas, and thinks the house is the perfect place for them to start a family

programme.title: Bone Detectives: Britain's Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Tori Herridge and a team of scientists piece together the story behind the discovery of 13 bodies with the skulls cut open in a 19th-century Bristol graveyard. The investigation uncovers a link to a local hospital, a celebrated surgeon, and the crime of bodysnatching

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Mother-of-three Virginia Houslin opens the contest in Huddersfield, West Yorkshire, and her hopes for some flirtatious fun are boosted by the arrival of her first guest, wedding singer Richard Wood. However the cheeky host faces a battle to win over the taste buds of her other diners as she tries to stake her claim for the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Business development manager Iyesha Atkins hosts the second dinner party in Huddersfield, West Yorkshire, hoping her sophisticated event will win her the £1,000 prize. However, the evening does not go to plan when Virginia finds fault with Iyesha's main course, and the two women fall out following a discussion about religion

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Wedding singer and confident cook Richard Wood hosts the third dinner party in Huddersfield. With steak on the menu, he opts not to listen to his guests' preferences and instead cooks and serves them his own way. However, with the starter a disaster and the rift between mum-of-three Virginia and ladette Iyesha deepening, Richard believes the only solution to save his night is for him to sing

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Tommy Mack hosts the fourth dinner-party challenge from Huddersfield, West Yorkshire, and tries to woo his guests with a Hollywood silent movie-themed evening, which includes a selection of mystery dishes and his very own style of rapping

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Kim Connor hosts the final party in Huddersfield, West Yorkshire, hoping her American diner-themed menu will delight her guests. Sweating over a hot stove is not what the glamorous hairdresser is used to, and she relies on helpful advice from her mother. The food fails to appeal to everyone's tastes, but Kim's after-dinner entertainment seems to revive her flagging chances of success

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Craig and his daughter Holly are pooling their resources to buy a property in their favourite holiday destination - Majorca. programme.desc: Maureen and Steve Smith head out to Orlando in Florida to search for a holiday home where they can escape the Scottish winters, with a budget of £80,000

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Gardening enthusiast Matt Sullivan hosts the third dinner party in Cambridge, where his home-grown English menu of 'posh' fish and chips and rice pudding surprises his guests. programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien repurposes some old suitcases, while Henry Cole gives an old dresser some serious bling

programme.desc: The Barones' cable TV goes on the blink, leaving them with a large amount of time on their hands - which they fill by playing games. Ray Romano stars

programme.desc: Debra's accusation that Ray is pessimistic stirs him into adopting a more positive outlook, but the rest of the family is not impressed by his change in attitude. Figure skater Katarina Witt guests stars in the comedy, with Ray Romano

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Florida to help the owners of Fleming, a Danish restaurant in Miami. A husband-and-wife duo bought the business eight years ago in the hope of continuing the place's success, but started losing money rapidly. With a Cuban chef cooking Nordic cuisine and a filthy kitchen, things go from bad to worse until it all comes to a head on relaunch night

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay tries to help a struggling seafood restaurant in Manhattan, where the three owners regularly come into conflict as they each try to assert their authority over the business, causing confusion for all. When one of the trio stubbornly resists the changes the Scottish chef is hoping to implement, sparks begin to fly

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Daters include 31-year-old Adam, who believes his voice - which has been compared to David Beckham's - puts off potential girlfriends. programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Shows under review include Get Organized with The Home Edit, Ratched, EastEnders, The Andrew Marr Show with Keir Starmer, Yorkshire Tea vs PG Tips: Battle of the Brews, The Great British Bake Off, The Third Day and Politics Live with the Prime Minster's address to the House of Commons

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Fifty-four-year-old James is rushed to A&E after a head on collision with his car windscreen, leaving doctors concerned he may have sustained a serious life changing injury. Elsewhere, Justice waits with his girlfriend Elissa to have a worrying lump on his finger examined

programme.title: Devon and Cornwall
programme.desc: Vineyard owner Val Thomas comes up with a plan to attract tourists to the Isles of Scilly in the winter - an observatory that takes advantage of the area's clearn night skies. Cornishman Mark Rudge is converting unwanted apples into a decent profit, mussel farmers Barry and Matt Sessions hatch a plan to outwit the seagulls and geologist Kevin Page goes fossil hunting

programme.title: Scotland's Scenic Railways
programme.desc: A look at the people who work on Scotland's railways and steam enthusiasts who safeguard these iconic routes. They include train conductor Suzie Sangan, whose social media posts celebrate one of the world's most beautiful railway lines. Cameras also focus on engineers abseiling beneath the Forth Bridge to carry out essential checks on one of the world's most famous UNESCO Heritage sites. programme.title: Lodgers for Codgers
programme.desc: Cameras follow another pair of young people as they take advantage of the millions of over-sixties sitting on empty rooms by moving in with them for a week. It seems Ché, who has been living in temporary accommodation his whole life, has landed on his feet when he moves in with multi-millionaire Charlie. Can the two find common ground? Meanwhile, 19-year-old Amelia swaps the family home for party-loving Karin's spare room

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Karen seeks spiritual guidance in a bid to allay her guilt over her recent engagement. Will and Grace expand their venture into property development, but clash with a ruthless couple known as the Real Estate Champions. Chloe Sevigny, Edie Falco and John Edward guest star

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Karen reveals she cannot drive, and persuades a reluctant Will to give her a lesson, but a police officer pulls them over for speeding. Meanwhile, Jack invites Grace to the cinema - only to see Stuart with another man. Eric McCormack and Megan Mullally star

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will takes Grace's advice and plays hard-to-get with his new boyfriend, but soon finds this does not seem to be helping matters. Meanwhile, Jack and Karen are distraught to learn their favourite TV show is being axed. Bebe Neuwirth and Sharon Osbourne guest star

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Part two of two. After catching Junior and his girlfriend Vanessa getting up to no good, Michael and Jay throw him out of the house, and he ends up living in a tent in the back garden until everything has calmed down

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Part one of two. As the day of Junior's graduation approaches, he shocks the family by announcing he wants to go to college. Michael decides to help him make a good impression at the induction - but resorts to offering the interviewer a bribe

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: A family who have generated more than 600 complaints from angry neighbours move into a quiet suburban street in Blackburn. Plus, a psychiatrist in south London battles a huge renovation next door, while thumping basslines, pounding walls and slamming doors deprive a mother and her family of sleep

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Featuring two quarrelling neighbours who record each other's every moment on CCTV and in diaries. Their dispute began when Thomas parked his caravan on a quiet cul-de-sac, much to the annoyance of his neighbour Mrs Potter. Plus, how a shared driveway pushed Susie to breaking point when her neighbour Grant put her young daughter at risk. Susie decided to install gates across the drive and use it for family barbecues, but Grant took matters into his own hands and it ended in a trip to the police station for him

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Officers chase £4,500 in court fees in north Wales after a property deal turned sour, and in Birmingham the agents try to collect over £3,500 from a single mum who defaulted on loan repayments. Elsewhere in Worcestershire, the enforcement agents try to recover more than £10,000 from a shop-keeper for fraudulently keeping a deposit during a property sale

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In Staffordshire agents try to collect nearly £2,500 in unpaid parking fines, while officers Matt and Garry head to the West Midlands to recover £4,500 owed from a debtor to his former girlfriend. Agents travel to south-east London looking to collect £3,000 owed by a taxi company

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In south-east London, officers Gary and Cona chase a debt of nearly £50,000 in unpaid rent, leading to a feisty confrontation with the debtor. Agents Gary and Paul try to recover over £2,000 owed by a teenager to a local garage in Kent, and officers Max and Paul head to south-west London on the trail of a film producer who owes £8,000 to financial advisers

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In Coventry, the sheriffs chase £10,000 owed by a publican to a contractor. The property appears to be empty, but after finding an ingenious method of entry, Matt and Garry are confronted by a surprised and angry landlord. Meanwhile, agents Max and Steve head to central London to try to recover almost £8,000 owed by a former peer of the realm to a firm of accountants

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Documentary following the work of a high-speed police interception unit. Officers pursue an off-road motorbike, which results in the riders trying to escape over a garden fence. Elsewhere, Garry and Stef catch one of Leeds' most prolific burglars, and officers find suspicious-looking paraphernalia in another driver's vehicle

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Police officers race through the streets of Leeds on an extraordinary pursuit. Elsewhere in Huddersfield, Duncan and dog Tia join forces with the firearms unit, combining their expertise to bring two wanted men to justice. Later, Adie and Chris spend an evening lost in a forest after hunting down a wanted vehicle

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Australian soap opera, charting the lives and loves of the residents of the suburb of Erinsborough

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Australian soap opera charting the latest comings and goings of the residents of Summer Bay

programme.title: Inside Iceland: Britain's Budget Supermarket
programme.desc: The secret world of Iceland's food development, sourcing, manufacturing and distribution, through exclusive access to the outlets and suppliers. In Thornton Cleveleys, just north of Blackpool, bargain-hunting customers are queuing overnight to be first in line to get some cheap food and the chance to win vouchers to spend at the opening of a brand new store

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: New Saydo Park arrivals Carole and Phyllis already love life in Spain but they want to experience more of the community spirit, so they sign up for fellow resident Margaret's mystery tour. Where will it take them? Tree surgeon Rocky faces danger on a daily basis as he tends to the high branches of the Costa del Sol, while young magician Dean faces the first night of a residency at the Chamber of Secrets theatre

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Cleaning duo Richard and Brennan take on some of Britain's filthiest and most cluttered homes. They begin with Lincolnshire single mum, Sam, who has dedicated her life to caring for her disabled daughter, leaving no time for cleaning

programme.title: The Gypsies Next Door
programme.desc: Documentary following travellers' constant struggle to co-exist with settled communities. Carol and her family cannot understand why her community is so hated and vilified, while local man Arthur is on a mission to understand what brings the travellers into parks and public areas - and Carol's caravan is his first stop. Johnny and his family live in a chalet in Essex but his non-traveller wife Andrea has had enough of feeling ostracised and wants to move back into a normal house

programme.title: My Mother the Monster
programme.desc: Adults Daniel, Christopher and Katrina relive the horrors of sharing their world with abusive mothers, including the story of one parent who was convicted of 26 charges of abuse. Thirty-year-old Christopher was taken into care from the age of three and went to live with respected foster mother and Jehovah's Witness Eunice in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire. Christopher arrived in what appeared to be a loving home in the middle of the countryside, but this idyll was short-lived and Christopher endured beatings and starvation for more than a decade. When Eunice's abuse was finally uncovered, she was sentenced to 14 years in prison

programme.title: Sarah Payne: 5 Mistakes That Caught a Killer
programme.desc: Examining the murder of Sarah Payne, an eight-year-old girl who was killed by Roy Whiting in 2000, and the mistakes he made that led to him being arrested and locked up for life. The programme features interviews with detectives, forensic experts and other crucial witnesses, charting the police investigation and the evidence that led them to her killer

programme.title: Babies 24/7: Maternity Ward
programme.desc: Midwife Jenna is away from the hospital on her community rounds visiting first time mum Steph who is overdue and more than ready to meet her baby

programme.title: Filthy House SOS

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will learns his parents are back together and has to explain the situation to a distraught Tina. Meanwhile, Elliot announces he wants to be a cheerleader - and proud father Jack resolves to help him achieve his dream

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will takes on the task of helping Jack with his graduation speech for nursing school. Unfortunately, he gets completely carried away in his attempts to write something creative and insightful. American sitcom, starring Eric McCormack and Sean Hayes

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Part two of two. Junior finally graduates, prompting proud parents Michael and Jay to reward him with an all-expenses-paid trip to Japan - which they also see as a way of ruining his plans to move in with Vanessa

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael is shocked to learn Junior is going to be a father, and reluctantly gives him a job - only to sack him on his first day for turning up late and being generally unsatisfactory

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: A man living in Cumbria takes issue with his neighbour's habit of letting his menagerie of chickens, cockerels, parrots and other birds freely wander along a residential road, and is even more disturbed by the fact that some of his fellow residents don't seem to have a problem with it. A former urban couple who moved to a rural valley in north Wales to breed horses enter open conflict with the owners of a nearby yurt business, whose fireworks parties spooked one of their prized beasts, resulting in an injury. Finally, a Romanian woman finds herself subject to abuse when she tries to set up a new home with her daughter in Wigan

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Documentary using eyewitness testimony and footage from camcorders, CCTV and phones to examine the experiences of people who have become involved in disputes with neighbours. Posters aimed at naming and shaming one of the residents of Withycombe, Somerset, for taking part in a government-backed badger cull result in him and his family being driven out by animal rights activists. In Woodford Green, north-east London, an ambitious house extension results in all light being blocked to one neighbouring property and huge cracks appearing in the other, while a Bournemouth woman ends up having a restraining order taken out against her after erecting a gated driveway before receiving official approval

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In south-east London, officers Gary and Cona chase a debt of nearly £50,000 in unpaid rent, leading to a feisty confrontation with the debtor. Agents Gary and Paul try to recover over £2,000 owed by a teenager to a local garage in Kent, and officers Max and Paul head to south-west London on the trail of a film producer who owes £8,000 to financial advisers

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In Coventry, the sheriffs chase £10,000 owed by a publican to a contractor. The property appears to be empty, but after finding an ingenious method of entry, Matt and Garry are confronted by a surprised and angry landlord. Meanwhile, agents Max and Steve head to central London to try to recover almost £8,000 owed by a former peer of the realm to a firm of accountants

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Sheriffs Stewart and Elmor try to recover almost £2,400 from a company director for unpaid invoices in Manchester, but face a fierce reception from a family who deny the debtor lives or trades from the address. Meanwhile, agents Gary and Cona in Kent chase nearly £4,000 owed by a couple for unpaid rent on a previous tenancy

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Max and Steve try to recover almost £2,000 owed by the owner of a bridal shop in London, while officers Gary and Cona in Kent chase over £4,000 of vet fees after two neighbouring dogs got into a fight. In south west London, agents try to collect almost £11,500 owed by a small business

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Officers chase a car trying to escape the wrong way down the M62, a pursuit which ends in three arrests and the seizure of a van full of potentially stolen generators. Elsewhere in West Yorkshire, the Proactive Intercept Team seize more than £200,000 of unlawfully obtained cash, and in Bradford, officers Nicky and Claire are on hand to get an unsafe Golf off the roads

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Documentary following the work of a high-speed police interception unit in Essex. Officers chase a drug dealer on a motorway at night, a drink-driver endangers his life in a bid to avoid arrest and the team pursues one of the area's most wanted car thieves

programme.title: Benefits Britain: Life on the Dole
programme.desc: Documentary chronicling the ups and downs of life for people on benefits in the UK, beginning with a visit to Liverpool to look at the effect of the bedroom tax. Lorna was living in a three-bedroom housing association home with her children, but when they moved out she was hit with a weekly £40 bedroom tax, which she has to pay out of her £72.40 employment and support allowance. Keith and Marie had been in their family home for 35 years, but after refusing to pay an extra £24 they were rehoused in a one-bedroom flat and forbidden from taking any of their animals with them

programme.title: Fare Dodgers: At War with the Law
programme.desc: A prolific offender is landed with an eyewatering bill to square off three years of illegal travel, while the police must step in when one suspect is found in possession of a banned substance. At one of London's busiest stations, vigilant inspectors Scott and Michelle have success intercepting repeat offenders, but will they catch a notorious passenger who the station staff report comes through their station each day?

programme.title: The Expendables 2 (2012)
programme.desc: Mercenary leader Barney Ross is recruited by the CIA to recover a top-secret package, only to come to blows with a rival band of hired guns. Barney swears revenge when the other faction kill his protege, and leads his men on a mission to stop their enemies taking over a former Soviet nuclear facility. Action thriller sequel, starring Sylvester Stallone and Jean-Claude Van Damme

programme.title: My Wife and Kids

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: The documentary focuses on two residential disputes that escalated from complaints about noise-making to far more serious quarrels. Warren and Sharee detail how their peaceful lives in a quiet Birmingham suburb were ruined when new neighbour Harry moved in. Harry complained of noise the pair knew wasn't coming from their household, an accusation he would level more than once, and with increasing intensity. Finally, when the hostile Harry pulled out a gun and threatened the couple over their garden fence, they were forced to sell up and move out. However, even after relocating, it seemed their nightmare was not over. Also featured is the story of Jill, who was just a teenager when Barry, who lived with his parents next-door, became fixated on her family making a racket. Brushing off the grievance, Jill and her relatives tried to get on with their lives, but one autumn day the feud took a tragic, life-changing turn

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Documentary using eyewitness testimony and footage from camcorders, CCTV and phones to examine traumatic, shocking, humorous and occasionally bizarre experiences of people who have become involved in disputes with neighbours. programme.title: The Mysteries of Laura
programme.desc: Undercover detective John Campbell is shot dead while investigating an illegal international trade in stolen luxury car parts. programme.desc: New York's district attorneys investigate the mysterious death of a stockbroker who was dating the daughter of a ruthless cosmetics mogul - and find themselves caught up in a wrangle over whether HRT withdrawal can be used as a defence in law. Police drama, guest starring Lucie Arnaz, with Jerry Orbach and Sam Waterston

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A novelist's apparent suicide becomes a murder case, with the evidence leading Lupo and his new partner Kevin Bernard to suspect a secretive religious group. Award-winning police drama, starring Jeremy Sisto and Anthony Anderson

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A legal-aid strike leads first to murder, and then to Rubirosa pitting her wits against Cutter as the ADA tries to bring a case against a pro golfer accused of the killing of a paralegal. American legal drama, starring Alana De La Garza and Linus Roache

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A tennis star is attacked in her locker room before a big tournament, and her wrist is broken during the incident. The sportswoman cannot give a description of her assailant, but the circumstances of the fray lead the detectives to suspect one of her competitors. Chris Noth stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green think they have got their man when the prime suspect in a murder investigation knows every detail about the killing. However, when he claims he acquired his information from a psychic vision, the detectives have their work cut out. Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When a woman dies in a hospital emergency room, Briscoe and Logan investigate a doctor's unorthodox method of treating cancer, which McCoy intends to prove is negligent homicide. Sam Waterston joins the cast

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team is called to a high school on a marine base, where a pupil has taken his classmates hostage and is threatening to detonate a bomb strapped to his chest. Gibbs manages to enter the classroom in an attempt to dissuade the boy, but soon realises someone else may be controlling his actions. Drama, with Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs is called to a frozen lake, where two children have discovered the body of a missing US Marine. The team searches the water for clues and finds three more bullet-ridden corpses, all of which have tattoos linking them to a notorious street gang. The case then becomes a race against time to discover what connects the murders before the serviceman's comrades seek revenge

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Abby becomes the target of an assassination attempt while working in the lab - and the team's search for her would-be killer leads to the main suspect in an embezzlement trial at which she is appearing as a witness. However, subsequent developments also place her ex-boyfriend in the frame. Mark Harmon, Pauley Perrette and Michael Weatherly star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A suspect dies while being restrained by Ziva, who finds herself accused of using undue force and becomes the subject of an internal investigation. To make matters worse, Jenny is kidnapped by the dead man's brother, who demands a consignment of impounded heroin in exchange for her release. Drama, guest starring Connor Trinneer (Enterprise) and Tamara Taylor (Bones), with Mark Harmon, Cote de Pablo and Lauren Holly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: While Gibbs attends the memorial service for a friend who was lost at sea, he discovers that the deceased man, Navy Captain Phillip Brooks, had been hiding in a fallout shelter after his boat was attacked and swam to shore. Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Sean Murray star

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Part two of three. The investigation into the warring prostitution rings threatens to tear the SVU team apart, but the squad is determined to uncover the truth. Cragen also stands accused of murder. Return of the crime drama, starring Dann Florek and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Part three of three. Cragen wakes up alongside a dead escort, who had been a potential witness. The squad tries to bring the case to a close as the detectives reach breaking point. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The SVU puts out a media appeal for information on a youngster found on the streets of New York covered in someone else's blood. The child's alleged father turns up to collect him, but tests reveal he is not biologically related - a development that makes Stabler doubt whether Kathy's unborn child is really his. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler investigate the murder of a 14-year-old immigrant girl, and initially suspect the involvement of a thug with a history of violence - but the case is complicated by the discovery that the victim was married to a 35-year-old polygamist

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The head of a notorious Puerto Rican gang is found dead outside a hotel shortly after his predecessor is released from jail. Mac is forced to use his diplomatic skills to prevent a revenge attack - but a second death and an ambush on a police car lead him to believe the killer is a disgruntled insider. Drama, starring Gary Sinise, with Edward James Olmos (Battlestar Galactica, Blade Runner)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Armed robbers break into the apartment of lawyer Roland Carson and make off in a helicopter with jewels worth more than $5million. The detectives investigate and, as people who have come into contact with the gems start to turn up dead, they suspect Carson could have staged the whole affair and killed his accomplices to cover his tracks. Drama, starring Gary Sinise and Carmine Giovinazzo

programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice.
